description:
About the job

Nuestros Red Bull Student Marketeers son parte del programa de embajadores de marca y producto más empoderado y dinámico del mundo. Ellos entienden a nuestro target y son responsables de manejar la imagen de la marca y el entendimiento del producto en sus universidades y área de influencia. El objetivo del Student Marketeer Program es alcanzar nuevos consumidores, conectarlos con la marca, aumentar las ventas y promover la marca en sus universidades. Esto incluye el contacto directo con consumidores y clientes, invitándolos a probar el producto, además de trabajar en eventos de Red Bull para asegurar que los consumidores vivan una experiencia inolvidable con la marca.

Todas las responsabilidades que te confiaremos:

SE UN EMBAJADOR DE LA MARCA Y PRODUCTO

Vive y respira la personalidad de la marca y los valores de la empresa, representándola de manera excepcional a través de interacciones diarias con los consumidores y/o clientes. Aumenta la base de consumidores en los lugares y momentos adecuados, respondiendo de manera acertada a cualquiera de sus preguntas. Crea y ejecuta un plan personalizado e innovador en el campus, involucrando a los estudiantes y dando vida a la marca en tu universidad. Establece una sólida red de contactos, construyendo relaciones con personas clave. Comparte contenido unico de la marca a traves de tus redes sociales. Trabaja en eventos de Red Bull y eventos patrocinados para asegurar una experiencia de marca inolvidable para los consumidores.

SE UN EXPERTO EN VENTAS

Construye relaciones con los gerentes locales de puntos de venta y asegúrate de que Red Bull esté disponible y visible para los consumidores. Colabora con el equipo de ventas para abrir nuevos puntos de distribución de Red Bull en tu campus y alrededores. Aprovecha los recursos relevantes del mundo Red Bull para mantener la marca siempre presente en los puntos de venta de tu area de influencia. Asegura una ejecución perfecta de acuerdo con los estándares definidos para cada punto de venta.

EXCELENCIA EN EJECUCION

Demuestra excelencia en la ejecución y atención a los detalles en todas las áreas de tu rol. Comparte ideas y colabora con el equipo. Planea y reporta tus actividades a través de la plataforma definida, de manera puntual y precisa. Contribuye al desarrollo de contenidos unicos para las plataformas de Red Bull proporcionando información local, tendencias y oportunidades interesantes.

Tus áreas de conocimiento y experiencia que más importan para este rol:


Apasionado(a) por la marca y el producto de Red Bull.
Excelentes habilidades de comunicación.
Personalidad carismática, enérgica, positiva y extrovertida.
Inmerso(a) en la vida estudiantil, con amplio conocimiento del entorno universitario, la ciudad y la región, incluyendo actividades extracurriculares y lugares de interés.
Muy accesible y sociable, con capacidad para relacionarse con diferentes personas en diversas ocasiones.
Mentalidad creativa y de espíritu emprendedor, con un alto sentido de responsabilidad e iniciativa.
Capacidad para conciliar el trabajo a tiempo parcial y los estudios.
Afinidad y deseo de aprender y aplicar nuevas habilidades, especialmente en marketing y ventas.
Conectado(a) con diversos grupos e individuos influyentes en el campus.
Licencia de conducir vigente.
Que se encuentre estudiando licenciatura de: Mercadotecnia, Negocios, Administración, Comunicación o relacionadas a partir del 3er semestre.


Creemos en el potencial de todos para dar aaalas a las personas y a las ideas sin distinción de género, raza, orientación afectivo-sexual, origen, edad y discapacidad. En el mundo de Red Bull, todos son bienvenidos.

Sales, Business Development & Marketing Group, Sales, Business Development & Marketing Group > Marketing Communications

General Summary

Qualcomm’s Industrial and Embedded IoT (IE-IoT) product marketing team is seeking a passionate product marketing communications specialist to join our team. This role will help ensure the successful management and execution of the day-to-day activities, include IE-IoT product launches and go-to-market initiatives and programs that drive awareness, engagement, and demand for Qualcomm IoT products and solutions. In this role, you will be on the cutting edge of emerging technologies and solutions that will contribute to Qualcomm’s expansion into new and diverse markets. This role will have exposure to all sides of the IE-IoT business: product management, engineering, business development, sales, channel and 360 marketing.

 Bachelor's degree and 2+ years of Communications, Marketing, Public Relations, or related work experience.



OR

Associate's degree and 4+ years of Communications, Marketing, Public Relations, or related work experience.

OR

High School Diploma or equivalent and 6+ years of Communications, Marketing, Public Relations, or related work experience.


Completed advanced degrees in a relevant field may be substituted for up to two years (Master’s = one year, Doctorate = two years) of work experience.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support projects and day-to-day marketing activities

 This is an office-based position in Mexico City that is expected to comply with the Company's onsite work policy. *

description:
About the job

At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.

We are looking for a Solutions Consultant to be part of our Professional Services team to deploy cloud products and services for our customers. This person must be a hands-on, self-starter who loves solving innovative problems in a fast-paced, agile environment. The ideal candidate will have the insight to connect a specific business problem and Snowflake’s solution and communicate that connection and vision to various technical and executive audiences.

The person we’re looking for shares our passion for reinventing the data platform and thrives in a dynamic environment. That means having the flexibility and willingness to jump in and get it done to make Snowflake and our customers successful. It means keeping up to date on the ever-evolving data and analytics technologies, and working collaboratively with a broad range of people inside and outside the company to be an authoritative resource for Snowflake and its customers.

AS A SOLUTIONS CONSULTANT AT SNOWFLAKE, YOU WILL:

As a Data Scientist / MLOps Consultant within Snowflake Professional Services, you will design and deliver machine learning and AI solutions for customers across a range of industries. This role focuses on helping customers implement scalable, production-ready solutions, including custom machine learning models, platform migrations, dashboards, GenAI applications, agents, and MLOps pipelines. You will work directly with customer stakeholders and internal teams to drive impactful solutions.

Skillset and Delivery Activities:


Proficiency in SQL.
Proficiency in Python and common data science libraries such as scikit-learn, pandas, NumPy, and SciPy.
Experience deploying machine learning models into production environments.
Deep understanding of core machine learning and statistical concepts.
Hands-on experience developing machine learning models. (Any of time series forecasting, regression, classification, clustering or neural networks).
Strong communication skills, with the ability to work effectively with customer stakeholders and cross-functional peers.
Demonstrated leadership and ownership in technical delivery.
Experience working with at least one major cloud platform, including AWS, Azure, or GCP.
Experience using generative AI tools to improve productivity in software development, solution design, or delivery workflows.



Preferred skills:


Experience working with the Snowflake platform.
Experience architecting solutions across multiple cloud services.
Experience leading teams through complex technical projects.
Previous consulting experience in customer-facing delivery environments.
Strong understanding of the end-to-end MLOps lifecycle, including deployment, monitoring, retraining, consumption, and automation.



WHY JOIN OUR GLOBAL CENTER OF EXCELLENCE TEAM AT SNOWFLAKE?


Expertise and Specialization: We are designed to bring together experts and specialists in a particular domain. This creates an environment where employees can collaborate with like-minded professionals, share knowledge, and learn from each other
Innovation and Best Practices: We focus on driving innovation and implementing best practices within our domain which is making sure customers have a healthy Snowflake adoption. Working with us will expose you to cutting-edge technologies, methodologies, and industry trends.
Professional Development: Access to mentorship, training programs, and continuous learning initiatives can enhance your skills and advance your career.
Impactful Work: Our CoE is established to address critical business challenges or opportunities. Working on our projects will allow you to contribute to solutions that have a significant impact on the organization's success.
Cross-Functional Collaboration: collaboration with various departments, teams, partners and customers around the world. 



Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.

How do you want to make your impact?

For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: Especialista en Paid Media
description:
About the job

📲⚡ Estamos buscando Especialista en Paid Media




Freeride Group | Ciudad de México (zona sur / Tlalpan)

En Freeride Group estamos buscando a una persona analítica, estratégica y con verdadero instinto digital para sumarse a nuestro equipo como Especialista en Paid Media 🏍️✨

Buscamos a alguien apasionado por la publicidad digital, con experiencia gestionando campañas de paga, capacidad para leer datos y convertirlos en decisiones, y muchas ganas de hacer crecer algunas de las marcas más emocionantes del mundo Power Sports.

Esta posición será clave para diseñar y ejecutar estrategias de pauta digital dentro de nuestro ecosistema de marcas:




Ducati, Polaris, Indian Motorcycle, Triumph, CF Moto, Moto Morini, Segway, Fantic y Kymco.




🎯 ¿Cuál será tu misión?

Planificar, ejecutar y optimizar campañas de publicidad digital en Meta, Google y TikTok que generen resultados reales: más alcance, más leads y más ventas para nuestras marcas premium.




🔥 Principales responsabilidades




Crear, configurar y optimizar campañas en Meta Ads, Google Ads y TikTok Ads.

Definir segmentaciones, objetivos y presupuestos alineados a las metas de cada marca.

Monitorear el rendimiento diario de las campañas y tomar decisiones ágiles con base en los datos.

Generar reportes claros con métricas clave: ROAS, CPC, CTR, CPL, conversiones y más.

Colaborar con el equipo creativo para asegurar que los assets estén optimizados para cada plataforma y objetivo.

Gestionar píxeles de seguimiento, audiencias personalizadas y estrategias de retargeting.

Apoyar en la estrategia de posicionamiento digital para fortalecer la visibilidad de nuestras marcas en buscadores.

Mantenerse al día con cambios en algoritmos, nuevos formatos y tendencias de las plataformas.







👤 ¿A quién estamos buscando?




Persona con 2 a 3 años de experiencia gestionando campañas de paid media.

Manejo de Meta Ads Manager y Google Ads; experiencia con TikTok Ads es un plus muy valorado.

Capacidad para analizar métricas, identificar oportunidades de mejora y actuar rápido.

Familiaridad con Google Analytics 4, Meta Business Suite y herramientas de seguimiento.

Residencia preferentemente en la zona sur de la CDMX o con facilidad para trasladarse a Tlalpan.

Posición 100% presencial.







✅ Nos encantará encontrar a alguien que…




Entienda que detrás de cada campaña hay una historia de marca que vale la pena contar bien.

Sea proactivo(a), ordenado(a) y con muy buena energía.

Disfrute tanto el análisis de datos como la parte creativa de la publicidad digital.

Tenga afinidad con el mundo motor, el lifestyle y las marcas aspiracionales.

Quiera crecer y desarrollarse dentro de un equipo con proyectos retadores y marcas de alto perfil.







🏢 Sobre Freeride Group

En Freeride Group somos un grupo de agencias y marcas especializado en el segmento

description:
About the job

Job Description

Sales Development Representative (SDR) – NetSuite

Resumen del Rol

El Sales Development Representative (SDR) es responsable de identificar, prospectar y desarrollar cuentas alineadas con el Perfil de Cliente Ideal (ICP) de NetSuite, generando conversaciones de valor que permitan identificar desafíos, iniciativas estratégicas y posibles oportunidades de transformación de negocio.

Como primer punto de contacto con potenciales clientes, el SDR ejecuta estrategias multicanal de prospección, diseña planes de contacto efectivos y agenda reuniones calificadas con tomadores de decisión. Su principal objetivo es generar Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs) de alta calidad mediante un entendimiento profundo de los retos y necesidades del cliente, facilitando una transición exitosa al equipo de ventas para la posterior calificación de oportunidades.

Dependiendo de la función asignada, el SDR puede desempeñarse en modelos Inbound, donde su foco será recibir marketing qualified leads, calificarlos y desarrollar la cuenta con agilidad ("Farmer"), o Outbound, con un enfoque proactivo de apertura de mercado y generación de nuevas conversaciones ("Hunter").

Perfil curioso, con ganas de potenciar sus habilidades con nuevas herramientas de tecnología ( Inteligencia artificial). Preferible nivel de inglés conversacional.

Perfil del Candidato

Experiencia


 Preferible experiencia en prospección comercial, generación de demanda, desarrollo de negocios o ventas consultivas, preferentemente en tecnología, software o soluciones SaaS. 
 Preferible experiencia en prospección outbound y/o gestión de leads inbound. 
 Familiaridad con herramientas CRM y plataformas de prospección digital. 



Competencias Clave


 Mentalidad Hunter para roles Outbound y Farmer para roles Inbound. 
 Excelente capacidad de investigación y mapeo de cuentas. 
 Habilidades de descubrimiento y escucha activa. 
 Comunicación efectiva y capacidad para generar confianza con ejecutivos y tomadores de decisión. 
 Disciplina, organización y consistencia en la ejecución diaria. 
 Orientación a resultados y cumplimiento de métricas. 
 Curiosidad intelectual y aprendizaje continuo. 
 Capacidad para adoptar y aprovechar herramientas de Inteligencia Artificial en su proceso comercial. 



Indicadores de Desempeño (KPIs)


 Sales Qualified Leads (SQLs) generados. 
 Oportunidades creadas a partir de SQLs transferidos. 
 Reuniones calificadas agendadas. 
 Conversión de prospectos a SQL. 
 Conversión de SQL a oportunidad. 
 Cumplimiento de actividades de prospección y planes de contacto. 
 Calidad de la información y documentación registrada en CRM. 



Lo que distingue a un SDR exitoso en NetSuite

Un SDR exitoso no se limita a generar reuniones; comprende profundamente el negocio del prospecto, identifica y documenta sus principales desafíos y construye el contexto necesario para que el equipo de ventas pueda desarrollar una conversación consultiva y convertir esa necesidad en una oportunidad real de negocio.

Responsibilities

Responsabilidades Principales


 Identificar y prospectar organizaciones que cumplan con el Perfil de Cliente Ideal (ICP) de NetSuite. 
 Investigar cuentas, industrias y contactos clave para desarrollar estrategias efectivas de acercamiento. 
 Diseñar y ejecutar planes de contacto multicanal (llamadas, correos electrónicos, LinkedIn, eventos, video mensajes y otras herramientas digitales). 
 Generar reuniones calificadas para el equipo comercial mediante la identificación de desafíos, necesidades de negocio, iniciativas de crecimiento o procesos susceptibles de mejora. 
 Descubrir y documentar los principales dolores, retos operativos y objetivos estratégicos de los prospectos. 
 Crear y mantener información actualizada en CRM sobre actividades, conversaciones, hallazgos y próximos pasos. 
 Utilizar herramientas de inteligencia artificial y tecnologías de automatización para mejorar la productividad, la personalización de mensajes y la efectividad de la prospección. 
 Colaborar estrechamente con Marketing y Ventas para optimizar campañas de generación de demanda y conversión de SQLs. 
 Asegurar una transferencia efectiva de contexto al equipo de ventas para facilitar la posterior calificación de oportunidades. 
 Mantener un alto nivel de actividad, seguimiento y disciplina comercial para garantizar una cobertura consistente del territorio asignado. 



Qualifications

Career Level - IC1

About Us

Only Oracle brings together the data, infrastructure, applications, and expertise to power everything from industry innovations to life-saving care. And with AI embedded across our products and services, we help customers turn that promise into a better future for all. Discover your potential at a company leading the way in AI and cloud solutions that impact billions of lives.

True innovation starts when everyone is empowered to contribute. That’s why we’re committed to growing a workforce that promotes opportunities for all with competitive benefits that support our people with flexible medical, life insurance, and retirement options. We also encourage employees to give back to their communities through our volunteer programs.

We’re committed to including people with disabilities at all stages of the employment process. If you require accessibility assistance or accommodation for a disability at any point, let us know by emailing accommodation-request_mb@oracle.com or by calling 1-888-404-2494 in the United States.

Oracle is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability and protected veterans’ status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Oracle will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records pursuant to applicable law.

Support the creation of sales materials and commercial presentations.

English proficient

Superior multi-tasking and organizational skills. Ability to manage multiple requests and deadlines concurrently and stay flexible and professional under pressure. Clear understanding of time-sensitivity around due dates of deadlines.
Strong attention to detail and organizational excellence.
Strong client-facing and communication skills, with the ability to confidently lead meetings and present ideas to clients, agencies, and internal stakeholders.
Creative 360° mindset with the ability to develop strategic and innovative branded content concepts across TV, digital, social media, and experiential platforms.
Strong storytelling and presentation-building skills, with the ability to create visually compelling decks and sales materials.
Ability to translate brand objectives into creative concepts and actionable content opportunities.
Excellent interpersonal skills and ability to manage high-level client relationships with professionalism and confidence.
A self-motivated team player with a strong work ethic, who can balance multiple priorities and create value for diverse stakeholders– within an ever-evolving media environment.
Ability to work independently, proactively, and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
Must be outgoing, organized, solution-oriented, a team player and a strategic thinker.
description:
About the job

Role Summary

The Brand Partnership and Innovation Content Strategist Coordinator will serve as a strategic link between commercial teams, clients, creative agencies, Sony’s internal departments, and production teams, ensuring the development of innovative proposals and high-impact executions for brands.

Within the Brand Partnerships & Innovation (BP&I) team, this role will focus on transforming brands’ business challenges and objectives into innovative, relevant, and culturally connected content ideas aligned with Sony Pictures audiences.

The Coordinator will be responsible for managing the development and follow-up of sponsored content campaigns, leading both the creative and operational coordination alongside their Manager.

Key Responsibilities


Strategy and Execution of Branded Content
Collaborate with the Sales teams to develop branded content proposals and bespoke brand integrations within our original content.
Actively participate in meetings and presentations with clients and agencies, representing the BP&I team in a strategic and creative capacity.
Oversee each phase of the project lifecycle, including development, production, and final content delivery.
Support the creation of sales materials and commercial presentations.
Cross-Functional Collaboration
Coordinate with the Digital, Production, Marketing, Programming, and Legal teams to ensure the successful execution of content initiatives.
Participate in creative sessions and production meetings to ensure campaigns reflect both the client’s brand values and Sony’s standards.
Digital Monetization
Support the development of digital and social content strategies to strengthen brand presence across Sony’s digital ecosystems.
Assist in the execution of digital campaigns and contribute to the evaluation of their impact and performance.
Client and Sales Relationship Management
Act as a key point of contact between the commercial and creative teams for the development of sponsored content strategies across Mexico and Latam.
Support Sales executives during client presentations by providing strategic and creative input.
Manage client and agency expectations and deliverables, maintaining smooth and consistent communication throughout the entire project.


Requirements


 A bachelor’s degree in production, digital communications, advertising, marketing or another business-related field is required.
 3 years of experience in sales support, with a preference for experience in creative roles, production, branded content or media. Experience working with brands, agencies, entertainment companies, or media environments is highly preferred.


Knowledge


Knowledge in audiovisual / production formats in Digital, in project coordination, from conception to delivery.
Strong understanding of entertainment, pop culture, digital trends, and branded content ecosystems.
Proficiency in PowerPoint, Keynote, and Canva.
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite is highly preferred, especially Photoshop and Illustrator.
Basic video editing and visual content development skills are a plus.
English proficient


Skills


Superior multi-tasking and organizational skills. Ability to manage multiple requests and deadlines concurrently and stay flexible and professional under pressure. Clear understanding of time-sensitivity around due dates of deadlines.
Strong attention to detail and organizational excellence.
Strong client-facing and communication skills, with the ability to confidently lead meetings and present ideas to clients, agencies, and internal stakeholders.
Creative 360° mindset with the ability to develop strategic and innovative branded content concepts across TV, digital, social media, and experiential platforms.
Strong storytelling and presentation-building skills, with the ability to create visually compelling decks and sales materials.
Ability to translate brand objectives into creative concepts and actionable content opportunities.
Excellent interpersonal skills and ability to manage high-level client relationships with professionalism and confidence.
A self-motivated team player with a strong work ethic, who can balance multiple priorities and create value for diverse stakeholders– within an ever-evolving media environment.
Ability to work independently, proactively, and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.
Must be outgoing, organized, solution-oriented, a team player and a strategic thinker.

description:
About the job

We help the world run better

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.

What You’ll Build

The SAP Mexico Next Gen program is a global-minded, strategic, paid graduate program that provides recent university graduates with opportunities to find purpose in their careers. This is more than a graduate program, it’s the foundation for a career built on connection, creativity, and impact.

Position Title: SAP Mexico Next Gen - Cloud ERP

Location: CDMX, Santa Fe

Expected Start: July 2026*

Duration: 24 Months

Be part of a cohesive team that effectively supports sales and meets customer requirements. This objective includes positioning the product portfolio to align with market needs, developing sales strategies that leverage team strengths, and fostering collaboration to create synergies within the team. This initiative aims to enhance overall performance and ensure that customer demands are met by a strong and prepared team.

What You’ll Do

Enhancing Forecasting and Pipeline Management for SAP Cloud ERP:

This goal focuses on developing and implementing a structured approach to forecasting and the evolution of the sales pipeline within our business suite cross portfolio. By conducting weekly follow-ups and tracking progress, the aim is to create a more accurate and responsive forecasting model that aligns with our strategic objectives and supports informed decision-making. This initiative is designed to refine our processes, ensure accountability, and ultimately drive improved business outcomes through enhanced visibility into our pipeline stages and budget achievement.

Trusted Advisor For Sales Leadership Team

This goal aims to establish a relationship of trust and reliability with the Sales Leadership team. By engaging deeply with their strategic initiatives and challenges, the objective is to provide guidance, insights, and support that contribute to the success of key deals and projects. This involves regular communication, understanding their objectives, and aligning support to enhance their performance. The goal reflects a commitment to collaboration and partnership, ensuring that the Sales Leadership team feels supported and valued.

Activities And Responsibilities

Examples of tasks which you will be responsible for:


Actively participate in developing and delivering new and existing projects that focus on business.
Monitor and communicate the results and achievements of project(s) and deals.
Support the sales team and stablishWork with different local and international business units to build relationships between SAP Labs Latin America sites (São Leopoldo & Monterrey) and their relevant stakeholders, leaders, and decision maker to boost visibility and expand possibilities.
Perform coordination and management duties such as e.g., arranging events, meetings, or workshops, dealing with stakeholders, reporting and content portfolio management. 


Who You Are

We need a trustworthy, upbeat, flexible, and cooperative person with good teamwork skills, who is committed to meeting objectives, someone who can question the existing situation and enjoys learning new things, focused on sales processes and customer facing activities.

For This You Will Need


Effective teamwork and relationship building skills.
To have the skill of creating visual content that matches and conveys ideas and concepts well.
To be an autonomous and original thinker who can initiate and carry out various concurrent tasks.
An eagerness to learn and a willingness to contribute new ideas to the team.
You should be an excellent team player with strong abilities to network and to work independently by using analytical and problem-solving skills and your willingness to learn quickly.
Advanced English & Spanish skills (written & spoken).
Good skills with Microsoft Office applications
Ability to gain productivity by using AI tools (Copilot or LLMs prompts is a main plus)
University student enrolled to Business Administration, International Relations, Economics, Marketing, Communications, or related courses


Bring out your best

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.

We win with inclusion

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.

SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.

Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.

AI Usage in the Recruitment Process

For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.

Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.

description:
About the job

Responsibilities

Team Introduction

CapCut, a ByteDance product, is a leading all-in-one video editing platform empowering creators worldwide. We’re expanding our vibrant LATAM community and seeking a talented specialist to drive content excellence and creator growth in this dynamic region.

CapCut Template is a feature that allows users to create videos quickly and easily by applying pre-designed editing formats. Users simply insert their own media to generate a customized final video.

These Templates Serve Different Types Of Users


 Content creators who professionally use social platforms and rely on templates to scale production and engage with trends.
 Professional videomakers, editors, and small businesses looking for practical, high-quality solutions for promotion and communication.
 Casual social media users who want to participate in trends or create fun videos without needing editing skills.



As a Content & Creator Operations Specialist, you will fuel CapCut’s growth in LATAM by scaling high-quality content, nurturing creators, and enhancing our content ecosystem. You’ll bridge data-driven insights, cultural trends, and creator empowerment to boost user engagement and platform revenue.

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early. Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 6 months long internship period.

Key Responsibilities


 Drive Content Growth: Increase content volume and quality across LATAM to accelerate user acquisition and revenue.
 End-to-End Content Operations:
 Identify content opportunities through app analytics, social media trends, and cultural insights.
 Curate and customize content strategies for target audiences using localized content elements.
 Manage content production cycles, collaborating with CapCut template creators on calibration.
 Plan in-app campaigns and cross-platform activities to amplify content reach and influence.
 Strengthen Creator Ecosystem:
 Recruit high-quality creators aligned with platform needs and regional content trends.
 Build distinguishing advantages through strategic creator partnerships.
 Creator Empowerment & Management:
 Diagnose creator pain points and skill gaps; deliver training on content strategy/editing.
 Design incentive policies and community guidelines to motivate and manage creators.



Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications:


 Currently pursuing a Bachelor's or Master's degree.
 Fluent in Spanish; professional English proficiency (working language).
 Deep familiarity with LATAM social media and cultural trends; strong content sensitivity: ability to identify viral trends and emerging creators.
 Knowledge of short-video platforms and/or AI tools; basic video editing skills.
 Able to intern for 6-12 months.
 Strong logical thinking and problem-solving with data-driven mindset: ability to translate metrics into actionable strategies., and cross-cultural communication.
 Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and resilient in fast-paced, global team environments.



Preferred Qualifications


 Experience operating social media accounts (personal or professional) is a strong plus.
 Proficiency with mobile/desktop editing tools (e.g., CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut) or AI tools is preferred.



Job Information

About CapCut

CapCut is an all-in-one video editing app that empowers creators to express themselves and transform videos into creative masterpieces. In addition to its basic features, such as video editing, text, stickers, filters, colors and music, CapCut offers free advanced features, including keyframe animation, smooth slow-motion effects, chroma key, Picture-in-Picture (PIP), and stabilization to help you capture and snip moments.

Why Join ByteDance

Inspiring creativity is at the core of ByteDance's mission. Our innovative products are built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and enrich life - a mission we work towards every day.

As ByteDancers, we strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our Company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

ByteDance is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At ByteDance, our mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

Reasonable Accommodation

ByteDance is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

description:
About the job

About Ingredion

Join Ingredion, where innovation impacts lives worldwide! Without even realizing it, you have experienced our work in your favorite chocolate, your pet’s food, the paper you write on, and your everyday snacks. As a global powerhouse across more than 60 industries, we harness the potential of natural ingredients to transform lives. Whether you are just starting your career or bringing years of experience, there is a place for you here to make a real difference. Be part of our team that values a wide range of perspectives and is committed to shaping a better world with every product we create.

Location: Guadalajara

Workplace type: Hybrid

Ingredion is looking for a Customer Specifications Specialist to join our team and ensure customer specifications remain a critical standard for evaluating product quality. Your expertise will help us deliver on our promise to customers and strengthen global coordination.

As a Customer Specifications Specialist, you will be part of a global team that coordinates customer specification documents and ensures timely, accurate reviews aligned with quality standards.

This role reports to the Lead Customer Specifications US & Canada.

What Will You Do


Lead and coordinate the customer specification review process regionally, working with participants from each plant and country to provide timely reviews aligned with customer segmentation policy.
Partner with colleagues to ensure timely responses to customer inquiries.
Review customer quality agreements with the appropriate plant and edit agreements to meet Ingredion quality requirements.
Collaborate cross-functionally with customers, plant quality, and sales to complete agreements and specification reviews.
Submit regional reviews for global customer review.
Maintain organized records of completed customer specifications and quality agreements in shared locations for easy retrieval by plant quality and global document teams.


What You Will Bring


Bachelor’s degree required.
Minimum of 2 years of experience in an operational, technical, or business role; plant quality or customer quality documentation experience strongly preferred.
Proven ability to work with cross-functional teams and interact with all levels of the Quality Organization.
Strong planning, organizing, and time management skills, attention to detail, and ability to work independently.
English fluency, both written and spoken.


Who You Are


Collaborative and able to cultivate positive relationships with customers, team members, plants, and support functions.
Adaptable, quick learner, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.
Skilled in prioritization and multitasking under high-volume conditions.
Computer-savvy; experience with Salesforce and SharePoint is advantageous.


Why Join Ingredion? 

Benefits

Discover why Ingredion is the ideal place to advance your career with our exceptional rewards and benefits package designed to help you thrive. Create the future with us and enjoy:


Total Rewards Package – Competitive salary and performance-based pay recognizing your contributions to our success.
Comprehensive Benefits & Wellness Support – Health, long-term savings, and resources for your physical, mental, and emotional well-being
Career Growth – Learning, training, and development opportunities, including tuition reimbursement.
Employee Recognition Program – A culture of real-time appreciation, with personalized recognition rewards globally
Employee Discount Program – Provides exclusive discounts on everyday products, services, and travel.


Ingredion uses AI-enabled tools to support parts of the recruitment process, including resume screening and interview scheduling. These tools help match candidate skills to job requirements and streamline communication. All AI-assisted decisions are reviewed by our Talent Acquisition team to ensure fairness and compliance with applicable laws. By applying, you acknowledge that AI may be used to support your application journey.

Relocation Available:

No

Additional marketing experience in one or more of the following fields: marketing and campaign experience from agency environment, search engine optimization and search engine marketing, video making (e.g., scripting, storyboard, and content), marketing content, usability labs and experience research, print production management
Global supply chain management (GSM), including sourcing new suppliers and assessing third party production vendors
Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)
Experience managing tasks or workstreams in a collaborative team environment with third parties
Ability to identify problems, brainstorm and analyze answers, and implement the best solutions
Relevant industry expertise and/or experience in product, sales, or marketing technology
Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.
description:
About the job

Our Purpose

Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.

Title And Summary

Consultant, Advisors & Consulting Services, Marketing

Job Description Summary

Services within Mastercard is responsible for acquiring, engaging, and retaining customers by managing fraud and risk, enhancing cybersecurity, and improving the digital payments experience. We provide value-added services and leverage expertise, data-driven insights, and execution. Our Advisors & Consulting Services team combines traditional management consulting with Mastercard’s rich data assets, proprietary platforms, and technologies to provide clients with powerful strategic insights and recommendations. Our teams work with a diverse global customer base across industries, from banking and payments to retail and restaurants.

The Advisors & Consulting Services group has five specializations: Strategy & Transformation, Performance Analytics, Business Experimentation, Marketing, and Program Management. Our Marketing consultants lead the strategy development and implementation of campaigns and engagements for clients. They use customer data to provide deep direct marketing expertise across channels, evaluating campaign results and adapting the approach to optimize marketing performance.

Positions for different specializations and levels are available in separate job postings. Please review our consulting specializations to learn more about all opportunities and apply for the position that is best suited to your background and experience: https://careers.mastercard.com/us/en/consulting-specializations-at-mastercard

Roles and Responsibilities

Client Impact


 Provide creative input and support deliverables and workstreams on projects across a range of industries and problem statements
 Contribute to the development of marketing strategies and activities for regional and global clients by working with technology and data
 Collaborate with Mastercard team to understand clients’ needs, agenda, and risks
 Develop working relationship with client analysts/managers, and act as trusted and reliable partner



Team Collaboration & Culture


 Collaborate with senior project delivery consultants to identify key findings, prepare effective presentations, and deliver recommendations to clients
 Independently identify issues in defined area of analysis, and structure and synthesize own analysis to highlight relevant findings
 Lead internal and client meetings, and contribute to project management
 Contribute to the firm's intellectual capital
 Receive mentorship from consulting leaders for professional growth and development



Qualifications

Basic qualifications


 Undergraduate degree with work experience focused on one or more of the following fields: marketing content, digital and/or social media campaigns, digital customer experience, digital marketing, offline marketing activities/campaigns, direct response marketing
 Relevant teamwork, and client, internal stakeholder and/or vendor management experience
 Advanced Word, Excel, and PowerPoint skills
 Ability to perform multiple tasks with multiple clients in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment
 Ability to communicate effectively in English and the local office language (if applicable)
 Eligibility to work in the country where you are applying, as well as apply for travel visas as required by travel needs



Preferred Qualifications


 Additional marketing experience in one or more of the following fields: marketing and campaign experience from agency environment, search engine optimization and search engine marketing, video making (e.g., scripting, storyboard, and content), marketing content, usability labs and experience research, print production management
 Global supply chain management (GSM), including sourcing new suppliers and assessing third party production vendors
 Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)
 Experience managing tasks or workstreams in a collaborative team environment with third parties
 Ability to identify problems, brainstorm and analyze answers, and implement the best solutions
 Relevant industry expertise and/or experience in product, sales, or marketing technology



Corporate Security Responsibility

 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:


Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

If you’re a curious and collaborative person who wants to make a big impact through technology, then we want to hear from you! Find out more at AVEVA Careers.

AVEVA requires all successful applicants to undergo and pass a comprehensive background check before they start employment. description:
About the job

Condé Nast is a global media company producing the highest quality content with a footprint of more than 1 billion consumers in 32 territories through print, digital, video and social platforms. The company’s portfolio includes many of the world’s most respected and influential media properties including Vogue, Vanity Fair, Glamour, Self, GQ, The New Yorker, Condé Nast Traveler/Traveller, Allure, AD, Bon Appétit and Wired, among others.

Job Description

Location:

Ciudad de México, CMX

Condé Nast is a global media company, home to iconic brands including Vogue, The New Yorker, GQ, Glamour, AD, Vanity Fair and Wired, among many others. The company's award-winning content reaches 84 million consumers in print, 367 million in digital and 379 million across social platforms, and generates more than 1 billion video views each month.

The company is headquartered in London and New York, and operates in 32 markets worldwide, including China, France, Germany, India, Italy, Japan, Mexico & Latin America, Spain, Taiwan, the UK and the USA, with local license partners across the globe.

What we’re looking for:

A Workday Engineer I to support the critical work of maintaining and evolving our Workday platform within a full tenant implementation. You will work within a broader Workday team that supports key business objectives by working with business stakeholders, project leads, and cross functional technology teams to build, test and deliver key technology efforts. The ideal candidate has foundational engineering skills with experience in Workday, specifically integrations and studio development, as well strong communication and interpersonal skills. The ideal candidate enjoys working in a dynamic, global, team-oriented environment and has keen attention to detail and the ability to collaborate with a diverse group of stakeholders across various business functions.

Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:


Support creation and updating basic reports and BIRT layouts
Foundational knowledge of Workday business process configuration including validation rules
Foundational understanding of Workday Security Fundamentals
Support creation and/or configuration of standard Workday Core Connections
Support the creation and configuration of Workday EIBs as well as how to load data using EIB processes
Foundational knowledge of software development, engineering, etc.
Strong ability to learn troubleshooting skills
Leverage knowledge of customer support principals, and best practices to provide best in class service to our internal customers
Engage with vendors as needed for support related to the platform
Support new Workday release activities relating to the needs of the business and impact assessment


Essential Skills & Requirements:


1+ years supporting Workday or similar experiences in other ERPs
Ability to effectively prioritize and execute tasks in a dynamic, flexible environment
Experience with ticketing systems and enterprise collaboration tools
Excellent interpersonal skills and strong customer service orientation
Highly self-motivated, self-directed, and attentive to detail
Demonstrated ability to work with cross-functional teams


What happens next?

If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply below, and we will review your application as soon as possible. You can update your resume or upload a cover letter at any time by accessing your candidate profile.

Condé Nast is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, age, familial status and other legally protected characteristics.

title: Asesor Financiero Independiente
description:
About the job

Asesor Financiero Independiente | Allianz México




¿Te interesa emprender en el sector financiero y construir un negocio con ingresos ilimitados?

 Buscamos personas con perfil comercial y ganas de desarrollarse como Asesores Financieros Independientes dentro de la promotoría #1 de Allianz en México.




No necesitas experiencia previa en el sector. Nosotros te capacitamos, te entrenamos desde cero y te acompañamos en tus primeras citas con tus clientes para ayudarte a cerrar negocios y acelerar tu crecimiento.




Tu principal responsabilidad

Proporcionar asesorías sobre inversiones, ahorro y planificación del retiro, así como desarrollar estrategias financieras personalizadas que estén alineadas con los objetivos de los clientes.

Desarrollarás y crecerás tu propia cartera de clientes a través de tu red de contactos, recomendaciones y prospección personal.




Lo que ofrecemos

• Capacitación y acompañamiento personalizado desde el inicio.

 • Coaches que te acompañarán a tus primeras citas con tus clientes.

 • Modelo 100% remoto y flexible en toda la República Mexicana.

 • Apoyo económico durante tu capacitación de $45,000 sujeto a resultados.

 • Comisiones altamente competitivas, bonos e ingresos sin tope. Promedio de ingreso mensual variable desde el primer año: ~$50,000 a $70,000 mensuales.

• Viajes, convenciones internacionales y desarrollo profesional continuo.

 • Respaldo de Allianz, una de las compañías financieras más importantes del mundo.




Perfil ideal

• Licenciatura terminada.

 • Red de contactos activa.

 • Habilidades de comunicación y negociación.

 • Mentalidad emprendedora y orientación a resultados.

 • Interés en desarrollar un negocio patrimonial a largo plazo. 

 • Indispensable tener disponibilidad por las mañanas para conectarse a las capacitaciones.




Si buscas independencia, crecimiento profesional y una carrera con alto potencial de ingresos, postúlate para agendar una entrevista.

description:
About the job

Gracias por tu interés en unirte a Solventum. Solventum es una empresa nueva en el ámbito de salud, pero con una sólida experiencia en la resolución de desafíos que transforman vidas y fortalecen el trabajo de los profesionales de la salud. En Solventum, las personas son el centro de cada innovación que desarrollamos. Con empatía, conocimiento y criterio clínico, trabajamos en conjunto con los líderes más destacados del sector para enfrentar los retos más complejos de nuestros clientes. Mientras continuamos actualizando nuestra Página de Carreras y los materiales dirigidos a los postulantes, es posible que algunos documentos aún muestren la marca anterior. Ten en cuenta que todas las oportunidades laborales publicadas pertenecen a Solventum, y que la Política de Privacidad mencionada https://www.solventum.com/en-us/home/legal/website-privacy-statement/applicant-privacy/a cualquier información personal que proporciones. Al igual que en 3M, en Solventum se brinda igualdad de oportunidades a todos los candidatos calificados, sin distinción de raza, color, religión, sexo, orientación sexual, identidad de género, origen nacional, discapacidad o estatus como veterano protegido. En Solventum, desarrollamos soluciones innovadoras para enfrentar los retos más complejos de nuestros clientes, liderando avances en salud mediante la combinación de ciencia médica, de materiales y de datos. Nuestro propósito es mejorar la vida de los pacientes y apoyar a los profesionales de la salud para que se desempeñen de la mejor manera posible.

Job Description

LATAM Strategic Account Manager – (Amazon & Mercado Libre)

At Solventum, we enable better, smarter, safer healthcare to improve lives. As a new company with a long legacy of creating breakthrough solutions for our customers’ toughest challenges, we pioneer game-changing innovations at the intersection of health, material and data science that change patients' lives for the better while enabling healthcare professionals to perform at their best. Because people, and their wellbeing, are at the heart of every scientific advancement we pursue. 

We partner closely with the brightest minds in healthcare to ensure that every solution we create melds the latest technology with compassion and empathy. Because at Solventum, we never stop solving for you.

The Impact You’ll Make in this Role

As the LATAM Key Account Manager for Marketplace Management, you will own the commercial strategy, growth delivery, and operational excellence across Amazon and Mercado Libre in Latin America. You will be accountable for exceeding revenue and profitability targets, strengthening marketplace fundamentals, and building trusted relationships with both internal and external stakeholders.


Driving profitable growth through disciplined marketplace strategy and execution for Littmann™
Leading high-impact negotiations that unlock incremental growth and improved commercial terms
Partnering closely with Marketing, eCommerce Specialist and cross functional teams to translate strategy into results
Collaborate with supply chain to ensure optimized OTIF and provide proactive and accurate inputs for the demand plan
Establishing strong operating rhythms to monitor performance and rapidly correct course


Key Responsibilities

Marketplace Growth Strategy & Account Leadership


Own Joint Business Plans (annual and quarterly) for LATAM marketplaces, translating objectives into clear execution roadmaps
Ensure ownership of critical eCommerce operational topics, driving the daily operating model and resolving key execution blockers
Drive business retention and profitable expansion through end-to-end marketplace management
Lead disciplined weekly, monthly, and quarterly operating rhythms and business reviews


Cross-Functional Collaboration with Marketing & eCommerce


Partner with Marketing to align marketplace execution to campaigns, positioning, and launches
Collaborate daily with marketing and eCommerce Specialist to optimize digital shelf performance, content, and conversion
Co-develop promotional calendars, testing roadmaps, and conversion-focused initiatives with Marketing


Negotiation & Commercial Excellence


Lead negotiations with marketplace partners to secure improved terms, programs, and visibility
Influence internal stakeholders across Finance, Supply Chain, and Marketing to maximize return on investment
Manage escalations and complex issues through structured problem-solving and executive communication


Performance Management & KPI Ownership


Define and own a balanced scorecard across sales, profitability, conversion, media efficiency, and operational KPIs
Lead weekly dashboards, monthly reviews, and quarterly performance readouts with clear insights and actions


Marketplace Fundamentals & Operational Excellence


Ensure best-in-class listing quality, pricing integrity, compliance, and inventory availability
Coordinate flawless execution of product launches, portfolio changes, and refreshes
Identify risks early and drive mitigation plans


Global & Area Alignment


Act as the primary LATAM marketplace interface with Global and Area teams (e.g., USAC, EMEA)
Align LATAM plans with global strategies, campaigns, launches, and governance standards
Share regional insights, best practices, risks, and opportunities to influence global roadmaps


Your Skills and Expertise

To set you up for success in this role from day one, Solventum requires (at a minimum):


Bachelor’s degree from an accredited institution or equivalent experience
Five (5) or more years of experience in Key Account Management, eCommerce, or marketplace-related roles
Demonstrated success managing large, complex accounts with measurable growth outcomes
Advanced English and Spanish or Portuguese proficiency


Additional qualifications that could help you succeed even further include:


Direct experience with Amazon, Mercado Libre, or other third-party marketplaces
Strong financial acumen, including P&L and ROI management
Spanish and/or Portuguese proficiency
Strong analytical, financial, and negotiation capabilities
Experience collaborating across global and regional teams


Responsibilities of this position include compliance with all corporate policies, procedures, and security standards while performing assigned duties.

Work location: Remote 

Must be legally authorized to work in country of employment without sponsorship for employment visa status.

Supporting Your Well-being

Solventum offers many programs to help you live your best life – both physically and financially. To ensure competitive pay and benefits, Solventum regularly benchmarks with other companies that are comparable in size and scope.

Solventum es un empleador que ofrece las mismas oportunidades. Solventum no discriminará a ningún solicitante de empleo por razones de raza, color, edad, religión, sexo, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género, origen nacional, discapacidad o estado de veterano.

description:
About the job

Who we are

About Stripe

Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.

About The Team

At Stripe, our Mexico City office is a vibrant hub at the forefront of our mission to reshape the financial landscape for businesses worldwide. Our team prioritizes collaboration, innovation, and excellence. As a member of the Mexico City team, you'll be part of a mission-driven community dedicated to enhancing the global economy and increasing the GDP of the internet. We strive for excellence by creating with craft and beauty, while having fun and celebrating our successes together.

We cultivate a culture of collaboration, inclusivity, and support where every team member’s voice matters. Our commitment shines through as we handle over a million support cases each year, empowering our users not just to solve problems but to achieve their goals.

What you’ll do

Responsibilities


Troubleshoot and solve external user issues 
Analyze our processes and instigate changes to help scale our operations and improve user experience 
Work closely with other Stripe teams to improve our product offerings and messaging around new products and features 
Gain unique insights into how thousands of businesses on Stripe scale and operate 
Have an opportunity to learn how Stripe operates from the ground up and make a real impact on the future of the organization 
Be a part of building a brand-new team and operational culture for Stripe 
Partner with global operations specialists or business process owners to run a critical workflow



Who you are

We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.

Minimum Requirements


You have a user-first mindset and are energized by the challenge of solving difficult problems
You have excellent communication skills, both written and verbal
You excel in critical thinking and problem solving
You have prior experience in customer service or internal and external user-facing operations
You enjoy learning about technical products and processes, you're an organized, self-starter with passion for finding solutions to our user’s challenges
You have a process-oriented mindset and the ability to get things done
You enjoy working in an in-office environment with strong cross-team collaboration and support
You prioritize well and enjoy working in a quick-moving environment
You are humble and have a proven track record for working well across teams and with external partners
You're willing to periodically work a weekend day for which you'll receive a weekday off. The SDC operates during daytime hours with shifts from the morning through early evening



Preferred Qualifications


* Prior experience or knowledge in user support
Prior experience working on projects or process improvement initiatives 

In-office expectations

Office-assigned Stripes in most of our locations are currently expected to spend at least 50% of the time in a given month in their local office or with users. This expectation may vary depending on role, team and location. For example, Stripes in Stripe Delivery Center roles in Mexico City, Mexico, Bengaluru, India, and Dublin, Ireland work 100% from the office. Also, some teams have greater in-office attendance requirements, to appropriately support our users and workflows, which the hiring manager will discuss. This approach helps strike a balance between bringing people together for in-person collaboration and learning from each other, while supporting flexibility when possible.

Pay and benefits

Stripe does not yet include pay ranges in job postings in every country. Stripe strongly values pay transparency and is working toward pay transparency globally.

description:
About the job

Introduction

A career in IBM Consulting is built on long-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.

At IBM, we help organizations create meaningful, data-driven customer experiences through scalable digital marketing solutions. We are looking for a Salesforce Marketing Cloud Consultant who brings strong platform expertise, a consulting mindset, and the ability to turn business needs into effective campaign solutions.

This is an exciting opportunity for a marketing automation professional who enjoys working at the intersection of technology, customer engagement, and problem-solving. In this role, you will partner with clients, internal stakeholders, and cross-functional teams to design and deliver personalized, multi-channel campaigns that drive measurable business impact.

Your Role And Responsibilities

As a Salesforce Marketing Cloud Consultant, you will be responsible for designing, building, and supporting marketing automation solutions within Salesforce Marketing Cloud. You will work closely with stakeholders to understand campaign objectives, evaluate technical requirements, and deliver scalable, high-quality executions across channels.

Key Responsibilities Include


Analyze campaign briefs and business requirements to design scalable solutions in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
Build, configure, and manage multi-channel customer journeys using Journey Builder.
Develop audience segmentation and targeting logic using SQL and Data Extensions.
Create and manage personalized and dynamic campaign content using AMPscript and Content Builder.
Support campaign execution through Automation Studio workflows, data preparation, and deployment activities.
Build and maintain Data Extensions, ensuring appropriate structure, data quality, and campaign readiness.
Develop Cloud Pages, forms, and landing page experiences when required by campaign needs.
Translate business requirements into efficient technical solutions aligned with campaign goals and platform capabilities.
Collaborate with client stakeholders, internal teams, and cross-functional partners to ensure successful project delivery.
Participate in campaign scoping, solution assessment, and effort estimation.
Troubleshoot issues related to campaign setup, personalization, audience selection, and execution workflows.
Contribute to quality, consistency, and operational excellence across campaign development and deployment processes.


Preferred Education

None

Required Technical And Professional Expertise

Advanced experience in Salesforce Marketing Cloud, leading the design, build, and optimization of marketing automation campaigns, including campaign execution and management.

Strong expertise in SQL and data modeling, including audience segmentation, Data Extensions management, and data relationship design.

Proven ability to design and execute multi-channel customer journeys using Journey Builder, along with automation of workflows through Automation Studio.

Solid experience in dynamic content personalization using AMPscript, combined with hands-on work in Content Builder and knowledge of HTML/CSS for email development and troubleshooting.

Ability to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions, with a strong understanding of integrations, data flows, and collaboration with cross-functional stakeholders.

Preferred Technical And Professional Experience

Salesforce Marketing Cloud certification

Experience with Cloud Pages, microsites, and user input forms

Knowledge of Server-Side JavaScript

Experience with APIs, integrations, and tools such as Postman

Familiarity with Email Studio and best practices for email campaign execution

Understanding of email deliverability and digital marketing compliance best practices

Experience supporting complex marketing automation solutions in a consulting or client-facing environment

Experience in solution assessment and effort estimation

Ability to provide guidance and support to junior team members

Exposure to Agile ways of working

description:
About the job

Leader in Architecture, Innovation and Technology Management

Are you looking to impact a leading transnational company with your knowledge? This opportunity is waiting for you!

Aon is in the business of the best decisions.

At Aon, we shape decisions for the better to protect and enrich the lives of people around the world.

As an organization, we are united through trust and are passionate about helping our colleagues and customers succeed.

What Will The Typical Day Be Like.

The regional leader of innovation, architecture, and technology management is responsible for defining and maintaining the technological architecture of the subregion (Mexico, Caribbean, and Central America), ensuring alignment with global standards and addressing local business needs and regulatory requirements.

Key Responsibilities


Architecture Strategy: Develop and maintain the regional technology architecture roadmap, covering applications, data, integration, and infrastructure.
Alignment and Governance: Ensure that all solutions comply with enterprise architecture principles, security standards, and regulatory frameworks.
Platform Integration: Design and monitor integration strategies for core platforms, APIs, and middleware to enable seamless interoperability between systems.
Innovation Enablement: Evaluates emerging technologies and proposes scalable solutions that support transformation and innovation initiatives.
Collaboration: Acting as a bridge between global architecture teams and local delivery units, ensuring consistency and adaptability.
Risk and compliance: Identify architectural risks and implement mitigation strategies, focused on resiliency, scalability, and security.
Technical Leadership: Provide guidance to development and integration teams, ensuring compliance with architectural best practices and patterns.


Skills And Experience That Will Lead To Success.


You must have a completed bachelor’s degree, 100% completed credits (Graduate).
Languages: Advanced English.
Experience: in enterprise architecture frameworks (e.g., TOGAF).
Strong knowledge of cloud platforms, integration technologies, and security principles.
Experience implementing services, microservices, and containers.
Ability to balance global standards with regional operational realities.
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
Experience transitioning platforms from legacy technologies to cloud technologies.
Ability to relate to different areas inside and outside the company, highly developed and proactive sense of urgency.


How We Support Our Colleagues.

In addition to our comprehensive benefits package, our agile environment allows you to manage your wellbeing and work-life balance, ensuring you can be your best at Aon. In addition, all colleagues enjoy two "Global Wellbeing Days" each year, which encourages them to take time to focus on themselves. We offer a variety of workstyle solutions, but we also recognize that flexibility goes beyond the workplace... And we are all in favor. We call this Smart Working!

Our culture of continuous learning inspires and equips you to learn, share, and grow, helping you reach your full potential. As a result, at Aon, you're more connected, relevant, and valued.

Aon values an innovative workplace where all colleagues feel empowered to be themselves.

Aon provides equal employment opportunity to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, veteran, marital status, domestic partnership, or other legally protected status.

We welcome everyone's applications and provide individuals with disabilities with reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application, interview process, and to perform essential job functions once on board. If you would like to learn more about the reasonable accommodations we offer, please email ReasonableAccommodations@Aon.com

Partner or customer facing negotiation experience preferred.
High attention to detail with a proactive, solution oriented mindset.
description:
About the job

Description and Requirements

 "At BMC trust is not just a word - it's a way of life!" Hybrid

Description and Requirements

BMC empowers nearly 80% of the Forbes Global 100 to accelerate business value, faster than humanly possible. Our industry-leading portfolio unlocks human and machine potential to drive business growth, innovation, and sustainable success. BMC does this in a simple and optimized way by connecting people, systems, and data that power the world’s largest organizations so they can seize a competitive advantage.

The Associate Renewals Sales Representative plays a key role in supporting BMC’s Digital Renewals organization by managing the automated end to end renewal process and partnering closely with internal teams and external stakeholders. This role requires strong renewal and quoting experience, solid commercial judgment, and the ability to operate independently with exceptional attention to detail in a fast paced environment.

The ideal candidate brings strong technical and analytical skills—particularly in Excel, reporting, data analytics, and AI tools—paired with a proactive, solution oriented mindset. This position offers exposure to enterprise customers and global stakeholders and is designed to evolve over time into increased partner and customer facing renewal negotiation responsibilities.

How YOU Will Contribute To BMC’s Success


 Oversee automated renewals by ensuring the end to end process executes accurately and completely.
 Prepare renewal quotes using our automated quote generation tool when transactions fall outside the automated workflow.
 Review and validate contracts, pricing, and compliance with commercial and legal terms.
 Support global renewals, with Americas experience considered a strong advantage.
 Apply commercial acumen to assess pricing scenarios, contract structures, renewal risks, and recovery opportunities.
 Manage multiple renewals and competing priorities independently in a fast paced environment.
 Leverage advanced Excel and analytics to track trends, build dashboards, and generate renewal forecasts.
 Use AI tools to streamline workflows, enhance reporting, and improve data accuracy.
 Maintain Salesforce hygiene to ensure accurate pipeline, renewal tracking, and forecasting.
 Partner cross functionally with Sales and, as responsibilities expand, with Legal, Finance, Rev Rec, Order Services, and Customer Success.
 Submit renewal orders for booking or process cancellations as required.
 Track non renewals, analyze cancellation drivers, and deliver data driven insights through regular reporting cycles.
 Demonstrate strong problem solving, initiative, and exceptional attention to detail.
 Engage in renewal discussions and negotiations with partners or customers as the role expands.


Requirements


 2+ years of experience in software renewals, quoting, sales operations, or customer success.
 Proficiency in Spanish and English; Portuguese is a plus.
 Hands on experience with renewal operations and quoting processes.
 Advanced Excel skills, including pivot tables, lookups, formulas, and reporting.
 Experience with analytics, dashboards, and data driven reporting.
 Exposure to AI tools and automation to improve operational efficiency.
 Understanding of commercial contracts, pricing models, and renewal terms.
 Experience with Salesforce.com or similar CRM platforms.
 Ability to thrive in a fast paced, deadline driven environment.
 Strong written and verbal communication skills.
 Ability to work independently within a global, cross functional structure.
 Partner or customer facing negotiation experience preferred.
 High attention to detail with a proactive, solution oriented mindset.


CA-DNP

Our commitment to you! 

BMC’s culture is built around its people. We have 6000+ brilliant minds working together across the globe. You won’t be known just by your employee number, but for your true authentic self. BMC lets you be YOU!

If after reading the above, You’re unsure if you meet the qualifications of this role but are deeply excited about BMC and this team, we still encourage you to apply! We want to attract talents from diverse backgrounds and experience to ensure we face the world together with the best ideas!

BMC is committed to equal opportunity employment regardless of race, age, sex, creed, color, religion, citizenship status, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, national origin, disability, marital status, pregnancy, disabled veteran or status as a protected veteran. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, visit the accommodation request page.

BMC Software maintains a strict policy of not requesting any form of payment in exchange for employment opportunities, upholding a fair and ethical hiring process.
