3+ years of experience as a Business Analyst, Product Analyst, or similar role in an Agile environment
Experience supporting e-commerce or digital product teams
Strong experience with JIRA for backlog and work item management
Proven ability to document feature requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria
Experience working closely with development teams on feature delivery and testing
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills
description:
About the job

Position Summary

SRS Distribution, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Home Depot, is seeking a Business Analyst to support our E-commerce Product Team within the Global Technology Center. This role serves as a key liaison between business stakeholders, product leadership, and engineering teams to drive the successful delivery of digital product enhancements.




The Business Analyst will be responsible for understanding feature requirements, documenting user stories, supporting Agile delivery, and validating product functionality across a suite of internal and customer-facing ecommerce applications. This role plays a critical part in improving digital experiences, optimizing business processes, and ensuring the quality delivery of product features.




Key Responsibilities

Requirements Gathering & Documentation

Partner with Product Managers and business stakeholders to understand and define feature requirements
Translate business needs into well-defined user stories, acceptance criteria, and functional documentation
Ensure requirements are clear, complete, and ready for development and testing




Backlog Management (JIRA)

Create, manage, and prioritize user stories, enhancements, and defects within JIRA
Maintain a well-organized and groomed backlog aligned to product priorities
Ensure all stories include clear business value, acceptance criteria, and dependencies 




Agile Product Delivery

Work closely with developers, QA engineers, and Product Managers throughout the Agile lifecycle
Participate in sprint planning, backlog refinement, daily stand-ups, and sprint reviews
Act as a key point of contact to ensure alignment across cross-functional teams




Feature Testing & Validation

Collaborate with development and QA teams to test features and validate functionality against requirements
Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and ensure defects are identified and resolved before release
Confirm delivered features meet business expectations and product standards




E-commerce Product Support

Support enhancements and ongoing improvements for e-commerce platforms and digital user experiences
Analyze customer journeys and workflows to identify opportunities to improve usability and conversion




Analytics & Performance Insights

Utilize Google Analytics and related tools to monitor user behavior, feature adoption, and performance
Translate data insights into actionable recommendations to improve product outcomes




Production Support & Continuous Improvement

Assist in troubleshooting production issues and conducting root cause analysis
Identify opportunities for process optimization, automation, and system enhancements




Governance & Compliance

Ensure adherence to enterprise standards, data governance, and compliance requirements




Required Qualifications

3+ years of experience as a Business Analyst, Product Analyst, or similar role in an Agile environment
Experience supporting e-commerce or digital product teams
Strong experience with JIRA for backlog and work item management
Proven ability to document feature requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria
Experience working closely with development teams on feature delivery and testing
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills

title: Email + SMS Project Manager
skills: Own the production timeline for monthly email campaigns across a portfolio of DTC clients, tracking every deliverable from brief through deployment, ensuring nothing ships late or half-baked.
Coordinate across strategists, copywriters, and designers to keep tasks moving through each stage of production, following up before deadlines slip rather than after.
Manage client communication for asset collection and approvals, gathering product imagery, promotional details, brand updates, and signoffs on time so campaigns stay on schedule.
Take detailed, actionable notes during client calls and internal meetings, documenting decisions, action items, and follow-ups so nothing gets lost between conversations.
Monitor flow and campaign progress in Asana, keeping boards clean, tasks current, and stakeholders informed on status without being asked.
Flag risks and blockers early – if a campaign is at risk of missing its send date, the team hears it from you first, along with a proposed path forward.
Support strategists in preparing for client calls by pulling together performance snapshots, campaign calendars, and any relevant context ahead of meetings.
Use AI tools (we use Claude) to streamline your workflow – drafting follow-ups, organizing meeting notes, building status updates, and finding faster ways to manage recurring processes.
2+ years of experience in project management, preferably at a marketing agency, eCommerce brand, or in a role managing multi-stakeholder creative production.
Proven ability to manage multiple concurrent projects with overlapping deadlines without dropping balls.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, you can follow up firmly without burning relationships, and your Slack messages are clear, not novels.
Excellent organizational instincts – you build systems and checklists, not just to-do lists.
Experience with project management tools (Asana strongly preferred) and comfort navigating Slack, Google Workspace, and Figma at a basic level.
High attention to detail – you catch the missing link in the message and the task that was marked done but wasn't.
description:
About the job

About the role

As an Email + SMS Project Manager at Homestead, you are the operational backbone of our lifecycle marketing team. You keep campaigns moving, deadlines tight, and nothing falling through the cracks – across a portfolio of DTC brands running monthly email campaigns, automated flows, and SMS programs.

You'll sit at the intersection of strategy, copy, design, and client communication. Your job is to make sure the right assets are in the right hands at the right time, approvals don't stall, and every campaign ships on time and at standard. When something's behind, you flag it before anyone else notices. When a client is slow on approvals, you follow up with the right mix of urgency and professionalism. When a strategist needs something pulled together for a call, you've already got it.




Responsibilities

Own the production timeline for monthly email campaigns across a portfolio of DTC clients, tracking every deliverable from brief through deployment, ensuring nothing ships late or half-baked.
Coordinate across strategists, copywriters, and designers to keep tasks moving through each stage of production, following up before deadlines slip rather than after.
Manage client communication for asset collection and approvals, gathering product imagery, promotional details, brand updates, and signoffs on time so campaigns stay on schedule.
Take detailed, actionable notes during client calls and internal meetings, documenting decisions, action items, and follow-ups so nothing gets lost between conversations.
Monitor flow and campaign progress in Asana, keeping boards clean, tasks current, and stakeholders informed on status without being asked.
Flag risks and blockers early – if a campaign is at risk of missing its send date, the team hears it from you first, along with a proposed path forward.
Support strategists in preparing for client calls by pulling together performance snapshots, campaign calendars, and any relevant context ahead of meetings.
Use AI tools (we use Claude) to streamline your workflow – drafting follow-ups, organizing meeting notes, building status updates, and finding faster ways to manage recurring processes.




Qualifications

2+ years of experience in project management, preferably at a marketing agency, eCommerce brand, or in a role managing multi-stakeholder creative production.
Proven ability to manage multiple concurrent projects with overlapping deadlines without dropping balls.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, you can follow up firmly without burning relationships, and your Slack messages are clear, not novels.
Excellent organizational instincts – you build systems and checklists, not just to-do lists.
Experience with project management tools (Asana strongly preferred) and comfort navigating Slack, Google Workspace, and Figma at a basic level.
High attention to detail – you catch the missing link in the message and the task that was marked done but wasn't.

title: Front Desk / Customer Support Specialist
skills: Answer and manage a high volume of inbound phone calls throughout the day
Professionally greet customers and serve as the first point of contact
Filter, triage, and route calls to the appropriate departments (sales, shipping, etc.)
Handle customer support inquiries and provide timely resolutions
Assist customers with product-related questions and sales inquiries (e.g., custom shirt printing)
Follow up with customers on orders, updates, and outstanding requests
Develop a strong understanding of products, services, and internal processes
Provide accurate and informed responses to customer questions
Support administrative tasks and ongoing communication follow-ups
Maintain a high standard of professionalism when representing the brand
Proven experience in customer service, call handling, or sales support roles
Excellent spoken and written English (near-native fluency required)
Comfortable handling a high volume of phone-based communication
Strong interpersonal and communication skills
Ability to quickly learn and retain product and operational knowledge
Highly organized and detail-oriented
Ability to multitask and remain composed in a fast-paced environment
Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment for calls
Experience in eCommerce, printing, apparel, or custom product businesses
Background in inbound sales or upselling
Familiarity with CRM systems and call management tools
Experience working with U.S.-based companies or customers
description:
About the job

Location: LATAM (Recommended) 

Hours Schedule: 40hours/week

Time Zone: Hawaii Time (8 AM - 4:30PM)




About Company and Role




The client is a custom printing company specializing in apparel and branded products. As the business continues to grow, the team is seeking a highly capable Virtual Assistant to serve as the frontline representative of the company.

This is a customer-facing, communication-heavy role that combines responsibilities across reception, customer support, and light sales. The ideal candidate will act as the first point of contact for all inbound communication, requiring professionalism, strong communication skills, and the ability to quickly develop deep knowledge of the company’s products and operations.




Key Responsibilities

Answer and manage a high volume of inbound phone calls throughout the day
Professionally greet customers and serve as the first point of contact
Filter, triage, and route calls to the appropriate departments (sales, shipping, etc.)
Handle customer support inquiries and provide timely resolutions
Assist customers with product-related questions and sales inquiries (e.g., custom shirt printing)
Follow up with customers on orders, updates, and outstanding requests
Develop a strong understanding of products, services, and internal processes
Provide accurate and informed responses to customer questions
Support administrative tasks and ongoing communication follow-ups
Maintain a high standard of professionalism when representing the brand




Must-Have Qualifications

Proven experience in customer service, call handling, or sales support roles
Excellent spoken and written English (near-native fluency required)
Comfortable handling a high volume of phone-based communication
Strong interpersonal and communication skills
Ability to quickly learn and retain product and operational knowledge
Highly organized and detail-oriented
Ability to multitask and remain composed in a fast-paced environment
Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment for calls




Nice-to-Have Qualifications

Experience in eCommerce, printing, apparel, or custom product businesses
Background in inbound sales or upselling
Familiarity with CRM systems and call management tools
Experience working with U.S.-based companies or customers

title: Jr. Content Designer
skills: Participate in brainstorming and concept development in a supporting role
Design low complexity projects from scratch.
Use editorial skills to create compelling and mesmerizing visual presentations for internal Marketing use
Assist in creating design materials (graphics, assets, photo retouching, mockups, etc.)
Execute design adaptations based on existing Key Visuals or Brand Guidelines to create Digital Ads, POS or other touchpoints.

Act as a brand guardian by following brand guidelines closely.

Strong creative portfolio, available online or as a PDF.
Proficiency in English.
Basic knowledge of print design.
Proficiency in Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign, Blender and After Affects is considered a plus.
1 year experience working with creative teams in agency or in-house agency environments is a plus.
Strong problem-solving and communication skills, with a willingness to learn and develop new design skills.
Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs.
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning.
Development programs according to Leadership skills.
Specialized training according to the role.
Learning experiences with internal and external providers.
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others.
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life.
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle.

And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others.
description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity

Jr. Content Designer role is a specialist position focused on print, digital, or motion content materials design. A successful candidate must have a proficient understanding and functional capability with software used to create graphics and designs from scratch, as well as the ability to edit and manipulate creative assets. They will be responsible for developing and producing production ready graphics.

Additionally, the Jr. Brand Content Designer must be able to follow creative processes and produce various materials with full consistency. The Jr. Content Designer is also responsible for supporting the creative versioning of existing assets within our brand portfolio to meet customer and consumer needs.

Your Impact

As Jr. Content Designer your functions would consist of:


 Participate in brainstorming and concept development in a supporting role
 Design low complexity projects from scratch.
 Use editorial skills to create compelling and mesmerizing visual presentations for internal Marketing use
 Assist in creating design materials (graphics, assets, photo retouching, mockups, etc.)
 Execute design adaptations based on existing Key Visuals or Brand Guidelines to create Digital Ads, POS or other touchpoints.
 Deliver simple print artworks when needed.
 Act as a brand guardian by following brand guidelines closely.
 Be detail oriented, with an ability to prioritize, multitask, and stay organized while responding to quick requests.
 Learning and apply feedback to improve designs.


Qualifications

Who Are We Looking For?


 Bachelor’s degree in a directly related field (Advertising, Graphic Design, Visual Arts, etc.).
 Strong creative portfolio, available online or as a PDF.
 Proficiency in English.
 Basic knowledge of print design.
 Proficiency in Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign, Blender and After Affects is considered a plus.
 1 year experience working with creative teams in agency or in-house agency environments is a plus.
 Strong problem-solving and communication skills, with a willingness to learn and develop new design skills.


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements.

What can you expect from us:


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs. 
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning. 
Development programs according to Leadership skills. 
Specialized training according to the role. 
Learning experiences with internal and external providers. 
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others. 
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life. 
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle. 
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others. 


We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

title: Sales Account Manager Ads, Amazon Advertising Mexico
skills: Use knowledge of Amazon Advertising full-funnel ad products and measurement to craft tailored proposals for customers.
Hit or exceed revenue targets for assigned book of business.
Achieve assigned non-revenue business objectives and goals.
Own all facets of the account management process for medium to large accounts, and develop strategic relationships with key points of contact.
In partnership with the account team, develop annual brand and media strategies that map to customer objectives.
Use first-party and third-party insights to build pre-flight, in-flight, and post-flight campaign-level recommendations that lead to revenue outcomes or increased customer satisfaction.
Advocate for customers internally, and utilize internal resources, to drive customer success.
Educate advertisers on performance metrics, category trends/approaches, and consumer insights using existing and/or customized insights.
Bachelor's degree in Economics, Marketing, Advertising, Statistics, Engineering, or Business
Experience in digital advertising and client facing roles
Experience analyzing data and best practices to assess performance drivers
Experience with annual brand and media planning
Experience with Excel
Master of Business Administration
Experience in display advertisement industry
Experience in omni-channel marketing, search engine marketing or search engine optimization
Experience in programmatic strategy and implementation
description:
About the job

Description

Amazon Ads helps brands create experiences that delight customers and deliver meaningful results. With 300+ million worldwide active customer accounts, and first-party insights based on shopping, streaming and browsing signals, brands can craft relevant campaigns that enhance customer experiences. Our solutions on Amazon.com, services like Twitch, IMDb T V, Alexa, Amazon Music, and partnerships with third-party publishers and exchanges make Amazon Ads the ultimate amplifier for brands to reach the right audiences in the right places, both on and off Amazon.

We’re looking for a results-oriented Account Manager who is passionate about partnering with our advertisers to make effective, analytically driven marketing decisions. As an Account Manager, you will manage and deliver against difficult advertiser goals and problems to drive revenue and exceed revenue targets. You nurture customer relationships, identify/close revenue driving actions and develop your client’s portfolio. Additionally, you will be able to leverage Amazon’s proprietary data to provide strategic and personalized campaign recommendations to meet your customer’s business goals. This role is highly collaborative, working with Creative, Sales, Product and Retail partners. The Account Manager’s strategic digital expertise is considered critical to unlocking greater value and impact for our advertisers.

Key Responsibilities


 Use knowledge of Amazon Advertising full-funnel ad products and measurement to craft tailored proposals for customers.
 Hit or exceed revenue targets for assigned book of business.
 Achieve assigned non-revenue business objectives and goals.
 Own all facets of the account management process for medium to large accounts, and develop strategic relationships with key points of contact.
 In partnership with the account team, develop annual brand and media strategies that map to customer objectives.
 Use first-party and third-party insights to build pre-flight, in-flight, and post-flight campaign-level recommendations that lead to revenue outcomes or increased customer satisfaction.
 Advocate for customers internally, and utilize internal resources, to drive customer success.
 Educate advertisers on performance metrics, category trends/approaches, and consumer insights using existing and/or customized insights.


Basic Qualifications


 Bachelor's degree in Economics, Marketing, Advertising, Statistics, Engineering, or Business
 Experience in digital advertising and client facing roles
 Experience analyzing data and best practices to assess performance drivers
 Experience with annual brand and media planning
 Experience with Excel


Preferred Qualifications


 Master of Business Administration
 Experience in display advertisement industry
 Experience in omni-channel marketing, search engine marketing or search engine optimization
 Experience in programmatic strategy and implementation


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.


Company - Servicios Comerciales Amazon Mexico S. de R.L. de C.V.

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT 

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity 

This role will transform complex data into actionable insights and predictive solutions that drive business decisions. This role combines strong statistical thinking, programming ability, and business acumen to design, build, and deploy data products and machine learning models in real environments.

Your Impact 

As Strategy Analyst your responsibilities would consist of


Create an integrated database combining recruitment, engagement, orders, and distribution data.
Explore, clean, and structure large, unorganized datasets
Develop a metrics framework covering the entire funnel, from recruitment to recurrence.
Design and analyze experiments (A/B tests, causal inference)
Monitor and control unit economics.
Define calculation methodologies.
Build inventory forecasting models.
Support the Venture Manager in developing growth projections for the customer base and associated unit economics.


Qualifications

¿Who Are We Looking For? 


Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science bachelor’s degree
Strong proficiency in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, numpy)
Advanced SQL skills
Solid understanding of statistics & probability
Experience with machine learning algorithms and model evaluation
Experience with data visualization tools and designing PowerBI dashboards
Clear communication with non-technical stakeholders
Structured problem solving
Curiosity and ownership
Results driven.
Work under pressure
Communication
Teamwork


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements. 

 

What can you expect from us: 


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs. 
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning. 
Development programs according to Leadership skills. 
Specialized training according to the role. 
Learning experiences with internal and external providers. 
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others. 
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life. 
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle. 
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others. 


 

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

title: AI Growth Specialist
skills: Implement and execute two established outbound projects, ensuring consistent delivery and optimization.
Build and maintain systematic processes that deliver predictable results.
Prepare and manage cold outreach campaigns, including writing and refining email sequences - using AI to draft, test, and iterate faster
Measure and continuously improve outreach campaign performance to drive sales pipeline growth.
Leverage AI tools to research prospects, personalize outreach at scale, and automate repetitive tasks.
Identify new opportunities, tools, and approaches to enhance our outreach processes - with a strong eye toward AI-native solutions.
Collaborate closely with marketing to optimize strategy and nurture cold leads into marketing and sales-qualified opportunities.
Provide accurate performance reporting to the C-level management team.
Work directly with the founding team on all outbound initiatives.
A fast learner who works autonomously.
Naturally curious about AI - you've explored tools like ChatGPT, Claude, or Perplexity on your own and find ways to apply them to real work.
Strong follow-through.
Proficient with Excel/Google Sheets.
Detail-oriented with a talent for building and maintaining efficient systems.
Results-driven with a bias toward action and continuous improvement.
Hungry to make an impact in a fast-paced startup environment.
Tech-savvy and eager to learn new tools.
Someone who thinks quickly, identifies issues proactively, and implements solutions.
AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and similar) for research, copywriting, and workflow automation.
Google Sheets for data management and analysis.
Email sequencing tools for campaign management.
Domain management platforms.
Apollo, Amplemarket, and other sales enablement technologies.
Various automation and outreach optimization tools.
You'll start fully focused on executing existing outbound processes and campaigns.
As you demonstrate success, you'll gradually take ownership of the entire outbound system.

Become a key revenue-generating team member in a fast-growing company.
Work directly with founders to shape and execute sales strategy.

Develop valuable technical skills with modern sales, AI, and marketing tools.
Freedom to test new ideas, tactics, and approaches with leadership support.
Join a team of high performers with high standards who value initiative and fresh thinking.
description:
About the job

About us:

At Near, we help top talent in Latin America find remote roles with US companies. Our mission is to create better lives by fostering a remote work culture that transcends borders.




About the role

We're revitalizing our outbound sales strategy and need someone hungry, resourceful, and AI-savvy to own this critical function. You'll implement proven projects already designed by our marketing/sales team, then have the freedom to optimize and develop new approaches as you demonstrate success.

This is a unique opportunity for a smart, driven individual who is curious and self-taught on AI to make a significant impact working directly with our founding team. We value execution and results over years of experience.




What You'll Do

Implement and execute two established outbound projects, ensuring consistent delivery and optimization.
Build and maintain systematic processes that deliver predictable results.
Prepare and manage cold outreach campaigns, including writing and refining email sequences - using AI to draft, test, and iterate faster
Measure and continuously improve outreach campaign performance to drive sales pipeline growth.
Leverage AI tools to research prospects, personalize outreach at scale, and automate repetitive tasks.
Identify new opportunities, tools, and approaches to enhance our outreach processes - with a strong eye toward AI-native solutions.
Collaborate closely with marketing to optimize strategy and nurture cold leads into marketing and sales-qualified opportunities.
Provide accurate performance reporting to the C-level management team.
Work directly with the founding team on all outbound initiatives.




Who You Are

A fast learner who works autonomously.
Naturally curious about AI - you've explored tools like ChatGPT, Claude, or Perplexity on your own and find ways to apply them to real work.
Strong follow-through.
Proficient with Excel/Google Sheets.
Detail-oriented with a talent for building and maintaining efficient systems.
Results-driven with a bias toward action and continuous improvement.
Hungry to make an impact in a fast-paced startup environment.
Tech-savvy and eager to learn new tools.
Someone who thinks quickly, identifies issues proactively, and implements solutions.




Tech Stack & Tools

You'll become proficient with a range of modern sales and AI tools, including:

AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and similar) for research, copywriting, and workflow automation.
Google Sheets for data management and analysis.
Email sequencing tools for campaign management.
Domain management platforms.
Apollo, Amplemarket, and other sales enablement technologies.
Various automation and outreach optimization tools.




Your Growth Path

You'll start fully focused on executing existing outbound processes and campaigns.
As you demonstrate success, you'll gradually take ownership of the entire outbound system.
Over time, you'll transition into a more strategic role, developing and implementing your own outbound initiatives.




What's In It For You

Become a key revenue-generating team member in a fast-growing company.
Work directly with founders to shape and execute sales strategy.
Significant room for growth and advancement as you demonstrate results.
Develop valuable technical skills with modern sales, AI, and marketing tools.
Freedom to test new ideas, tactics, and approaches with leadership support.
Join a team of high performers with high standards who value initiative and fresh thinking.

description:
About the job

Location: Mexico City (CDMX) - Mérida, Cancún and Puebla required

Sector Focus: Mérida, Cancún y Puebla

About The Role

We are seeking a highly experienced and senior professional to join our team in Mexico City. This role requires a strategic thinker with exceptional analytical skills, capable of driving business decisions and performance in alignment with corporate objectives. The successful candidate will have extensive experience in the León and Aguascalientes markets and will be responsible for managing and optimizing operations in these regions while maintaining headquarters responsibilities in CDMX.

Key Responsibilities


Lead and execute market strategies for León and Aguascalientes, ensuring alignment with overall business objectives. 
Analyze complex data sets to inform decision-making, identify growth opportunities, and optimize sales and operational performance. 
Develop actionable insights through advanced reporting, forecasting, and market trend analysis. 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams across the organization to implement initiatives effectively. 
Build strong relationships with key clients, distributors, and stakeholders in the assigned territories. 
Represent the company in high-level negotiations and strategic discussions. 
Travel regularly to Guadalajara and other regions as required to oversee operations, build partnerships, and ensure execution excellence. 


Required Qualifications:


Proven senior-level experience in relevant sectors, including León and Aguascalientes markets. 
Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret complex data and provide strategic recommendations. 
Strong leadership and stakeholder management experience, capable of operating at a senior decision-making level. 
Ability to travel frequently to Guadalajara and work effectively across multiple locations. 
Excellent communication skills in Spanish and English. 


Preferred:


Experience leading high-impact projects with measurable business outcomes. 
Background in FMCG, Personal Care, or related sectors (depending on your organization's focus). 
Advanced proficiency in analytical tools and business intelligence platforms. 


Why Join Us:

This is a high-impact role for a senior professional seeking to lead strategic initiatives and influence business performance at a regional and national level. The successful candidate will have the autonomy to drive decisions while operating within a collaborative, data-driven environment.

description:
About the job

The Producer Roaster Forum (PRF) is a trade show and forum event that connects coffee producers and roasters, held once a year in coffee-producing countries. These events facilitate direct interactions, networking, and knowledge sharing, promoting innovation and strengthening the global coffee supply chain.




In addition to PRF, we organize the Global Coffee Awards across Europe, Latin America, Asia and more. As our designer, you will have the unique opportunity to shape the distinct visual identities and sub-brands for all of these international events throughout the year.




PRF is seeking a talented Brand & Visual Designer (Graphic Designer) to join our team. The ideal candidate will bring 3+ years of digital design experience, a proven track record of collaborating in a team environment, and a passion for flexing their creative muscles.




This is a permanent, full-time, fully remote role. You'll be joining a diverse, remote-first team currently spanning across Central and South America.




Because each of our events demands a completely new brand and visual refresh, we are looking for a designer who loves to innovate rather than replicate. You should be someone who embraces change, welcomes the challenge of frequent rebranding, and constantly seeks to push the creative envelope with fresh, forward-thinking designs.




PRF is the most important coffee event held in producing countries. As part of this team, you will report to our Marketing Manager, who will manage your workload, which includes:




Develop digital designs that help to achieve marketing and strategic goals for our brand.
Create new graphics in accordance with the existing brand guidelines.
Create, develop, and manage digital design solutions for a variety of uses, including social media, websites, graphics, newsletters, etc.
Liaise with the team on regular calls and team meetings to understand the range of projects and turn their descriptions into striking, aesthetic design assets.
Alter existing assets to be suitable across a range of platforms and formats.
Make necessary improvements to existing graphics/designs.
Ensure all designs follow the company’s brand guidelines and visual identity. Maintain consistent visual elements across all platforms and materials.
Be detail-oriented and organized in your day-to-day work.
Bring creativity to team brainstorming sessions.




ESSENTIAL:

A minimum of 3 years of experience with digital design.
A minimum of 3 years of experience using Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, AfterEffects, and tools such as Sketch or similar.
Experience with Figma or similar.
Bilingual - Spanish/English.
Ability to autonomously ideate, design, and create content for print.
Good understanding of social media (and visuals/graphics performing well across these platforms).
Good communication and interpersonal skills.
Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage time effectively.
Collaborative skills.
Contribute effectively within an organizational structure.
Ability to perform as part of a small team.
An interest in the specialty coffee sector.
Willingness to travel to coffee farms and participate in events.




DESIRABLE:

Klaviyo
Website UI/UX design
Understanding of HTML
CMS experience (ideally WordPress)
Video editing skills
Illustration skills are a big plus




If you're interested in this opportunity, please email your CV or portfolio to hiring@producerroasterforum.com, including:




Your notice period
Your salary expectations in Mexican Pesos (MXN)




Please ensure all information is submitted in English.

For more details about the role, visit our website: producerroasterforum.com or check out our Instagram: @producerroasterforum to familiarise yourself with our brand's look and feel.

title: Content Creator Education and Marketing Project Intern (TikTok Shop Mexico) - 2026 Start (BS/ MS)
skills: Support the creator education strategy for TikTok Shop, including the design and production of educational content (videos, guides, tutorials) aimed at improving content quality and platform knowledge.

Set up, write, and execute creator communications across channels such as Push, Inbox, WhatsApp, and Email, including copywriting, message setup, and campaign deployment, ensuring proper segmentation, clarity, and performance focus (CTR, OR).
Own the management and day-to-day operations of WhatsApp creator communities, including content sharing, moderation, follow-ups, and coordination around key initiatives.
Collaborate closely with content agencies to coordinate deliverables, review scripts, provide feedback, and ensure alignment with marketing and performance objectives.

Support the execution and follow-up of key TikTok Shop campaigns (e.g., competitions, missions, and special initiatives), ensuring educational and communication materials are correctly implemented across channels.
Research and analyze creator education and marketing strategies from other markets to propose improvements and adaptations.
Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume
Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related major.
Strong interest in digital content, creator marketing, TikTok, and the e-commerce ecosystem.
Solid communication skills, strategic thinking, and a results-oriented mindset.
Experience or strong interest in content production (video, scripting, copywriting), ideally with familiarity with TikTok-style content.
Familiarity with TikTok content ecosystem, shoppable content, and brand-creator partnerships is a plus
description:
About the job

Responsibilities

About the Team

The commerce industry has seen tremendous growth in recent years and has become a hotly contested space amongst leading Internet companies, and its future growth cannot be underestimated. We aim to bring discovery, inspiration, and joy back to shopping by making TikTok the commerce channel of choice for merchants, creators, and affiliates.

You've seen the virality and impact of #TikTokMadeMeBuyIt. Come join the team that is helping scale that phenomenon, and pioneer Content & Creator commerce in the LATAM. We aim to bring discovery, inspiration, and joy back to shopping by making TikTok the leading, on-trend commerce platform of choice for brands, creators, and shoppers. We are an entrepreneurial team, passionate about shaping the future of shopping.

The TikTok Shop LATAM operation team aims to deliver high quality products together with a unique customer experience via TikTok. The team is responsible for building the TikTok E-commerce partnership for the TikTok e-commerce business in the US. With more than 1 billion loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join us to build an e-commerce ecosystem that is innovative, secure and intuitive for our users together.

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 6 months long internship period.

Responsibilities:


 Support the creator education strategy for TikTok Shop, including the design and production of educational content (videos, guides, tutorials) aimed at improving content quality and platform knowledge.
 Set up, write, and execute creator communications across channels such as Push, Inbox, WhatsApp, and Email, including copywriting, message setup, and campaign deployment, ensuring proper segmentation, clarity, and performance focus (CTR, OR).
 Own the management and day-to-day operations of WhatsApp creator communities, including content sharing, moderation, follow-ups, and coordination around key initiatives.
 Collaborate closely with content agencies to coordinate deliverables, review scripts, provide feedback, and ensure alignment with marketing and performance objectives.
 Support the execution and follow-up of key TikTok Shop campaigns (e.g., competitions, missions, and special initiatives), ensuring educational and communication materials are correctly implemented across channels.
 Research and analyze creator education and marketing strategies from other markets to propose improvements and adaptations.


Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications:


 Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume
 Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related major.
 Strong interest in digital content, creator marketing, TikTok, and the e-commerce ecosystem.
 Solid communication skills, strategic thinking, and a results-oriented mindset.
 Experience or strong interest in content production (video, scripting, copywriting), ideally with familiarity with TikTok-style content.


Preferred Qualifications:


 Familiarity with TikTok content ecosystem, shoppable content, and brand-creator partnerships is a plus


For TikTok

By submitting an application for this role, you accept and agree to our global applicant privacy policy, which may be accessed here: https://careers.tiktok.com/legal/privacy

Job Information

About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

TikTok Accommodation

TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

description:
About the job

To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.

Job Category

Marketing & Communications

Job Details

About Salesforce

Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.

Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.

The Mission

This role sits on the Slack Creative team and partners directly with our Design Director for Brand Systems, Events, and Web — producing programs and projects across all three verticals. While the title is producer, our team plays hybrid roles throughout the course of a project. Some days that looks like strategic program management; other days it's hands-on creative production. The throughline is ownership: you drive the work from kickoff to delivery, whatever shape that takes.

What You’ll Do

These responsibilities span all three verticals — web, brand systems, and events. You'll move between strategic planning and tactical execution depending on what the work needs.

Production & Program Management


Lead project scoping, timeline development, and resourcing across a high volume of simultaneous projects — from small updates to large-scale productions
Define AI forward production strategies and operational frameworks that allow complex work to scale smoothly
Oversee detailed production timelines, project workbacks, and cross-team coordination
Manage agency partners and creative vendors
Anticipate risks, connect silos, socialize changes, and always come with a backup plan


Collaboration & Visibility


Build strong relationships and trust with partner teams, ensuring collaboration at every stage
Drive visibility and clear communication across creative leadership and cross-functional partners
Collaborate with the creative team to translate bold ideas into execution, ensuring the vision comes through in every detail
Serve as the operational hub across internal stakeholders and external partners from kickoff through delivery


AI Implementation & Workflow Design


Develop and implement AI-forward project management workflows and tooling across web, brand, and event workstreams
Identify repeatable processes and build AI-assisted solutions that reduce manual overhead
Build generative workflows for design template production that accelerate output without compromising brand standards


What You Should Bring


Background in corporate events production, including budget management, and vendor sourcing
Experience producing website content across design, engineering, and marketing stakeholders
Hands-on experience with brand systems and design template management
Demonstrated experience implementing AI tools into production or project management workflows
Strategic and creative simultaneously — you hold the vision while managing the details
Calm under pressure- you manage competing priorities in a fast paced environment with good judgment
A clear, confident communicator who earns trust across teams


Why Slack?

At Slack, we're on a mission to make work life simpler, more pleasant, and more productive. Our Brand & Creative team plays a critical role in bringing that mission to life through world-class design and storytelling. You'll have the opportunity to shape how millions of people experience Slack across our digital touch-points.

Our Values


Empathy - We care about the people we work with and the people we serve
Courtesy - We treat each other with respect
Thriving - We create an environment where people can do their best work
Craftsmanship - We take pride in the quality of our work


To Apply

Please submit your resume, portfolio, and a brief note about why you're excited about this role.

Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Unleash Your Potential

When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and be your best, and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can do your best. Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.

Accommodations

If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.

Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.

Posting Statement

Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

description:
About the job

Responsibilities

Team Introduction

The e-commerce industry has grown tremendously recently, becoming a hotly contested space among leading Internet companies. Its future growth cannot be underestimated.

With millions of loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join our campaign team. Together, we can build an e-commerce ecosystem that is innovative, secure, and intuitive for our users.

Step into a dynamic role with the Mexico operation team, where you'll play a vital part in executing varies campaigns for some of the most iconic brands. Be at the forefront of innovation, contributing to cutting-edge campaigns and driving forward the yearly strategic modules that define success. In this role, you’ll help power the future of e-commerce, supporting high-impact initiatives that connect brands with consumers in meaningful ways. Join us as we shape the future of e-commerce here at TikTok Shop!

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 3 months long internship period.

Responsibilities:


 Assist in empowering and incubating high-potential e-commerce creators by providing daily support, guidance, and encouragement on content production techniques.
 Actively communicate and build strong, trust-based relationships with creators and agency hosts, ensuring they feel supported and motivated to achieve their sales goals.
 Support the team in matching curated product assortments with the right creators, helping to brainstorm and co-create engaging e-commerce content (short videos & livestreams).
 Help organize and facilitate training sessions for livestream hosts, assisting them in understanding livestreaming tools, refining on-camera scripts, and improving viewer interaction.
 Assist in tracking and analyzing post-livestream data. Help translate these data insights into easy-to-understand, actionable advice that creators can use to optimize their future sessions.
 Guide creators to maintain high-quality content standards and adhere to platform guidelines, fostering a healthy e-commerce ecosystem.


Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications


 Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related fields
 Strong skills in interpersonal and communication; you are a "people person" who genuinely enjoys interacting, listening, and building rapport with diverse individuals.
 Proactive fast-learner, open to navigating uncertain and exploratory business scenarios.
 Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume.
 Proven skills in analytical with a willingness to learn how to use data to formulate actionable strategies.


Preferred Qualifications


 Strong analytical skills, with a structured and critical approach to problem-solving;
 Experience in TikTok platform, short-form video trends, and the livestreaming e-commerce ecosystem.


Job Information

About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

TikTok Accommodation

TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

description:
About the job

Role: Junior Customer Service & Sales Assistant (Remote Home Office In Mexico)

Schedule: Monday - Friday, 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST (California Time Zone Alignment Required)

Compensation: $950-$1100 USD/month

Employment Type: Long-Term Permanent Contractor Role


About the Client & Role

We are building a managed inbound operations and sales execution function for a premier, established commercial facilities service provider operating across Northern California. The client specializes in the installation, repair, and maintenance of high-traffic commercial doors, automated industrial gates, security fencing, and heavy-duty loading dock equipment. Their clientele includes major warehousing hubs, logistics centers, 3PLs, and commercial property management firms.

We are looking for a professional, results-oriented Inbound Sales & Account Management Specialist in Mexico to manage incoming leads, confidently walk customers through the evaluation process, and actively close deals.




This is strictly an inbound sales and account management role—there is zero cold calling or outbound "hunting." Leads come directly to you at the moment of intent via phone, email, and web forms. Your primary focus is using consultative sales and solid deal management to convert interested facility managers into booked, revenue-generating jobs. You are the consultative partner who owns the pipeline from initial contact to secured deposit.




What You’ll Do
Qualify & Consult: Promptly respond to inbound calls and inquiries. Listen actively to diagnose the operational issue (e.g., a broken warehouse overhead door, a malfunctioning security gate, or an offline dock leveler) and assess the scope and urgency.
Manage Deals & Close: Educate prospects on their options, explain service deliverables, and guide them clearly through our pricing matrix. Confidently navigate objections, articulate our value proposition, ask for the sale, and secure the booking or deposit.
System Integration & Account Management: Seamlessly interface with clients using both our internal CRM and modern commercial facility vendor portals (such as ServiceChannel, Fexa, Corrigo, and SAP Ariba) to receive work orders, log deal statuses, and submit required documentation.
Dispatch Preparation: Collect critical job site details, confirm authorization, and organize the closed deal pipeline so the regional dispatch team can flawlessly deploy the right field technicians.
Data Integrity: Maintain meticulous, real-time records of all deals and communication history in the CRM, keeping the sales and service pipeline organized and pristine.
Team Collaboration: Participate in weekly performance alignment meetings, sales coaching, and QA reviews.




What We’re Looking For
Education: Bachelor's Degree required.
Experience: 2+ years of professional experience in Inbound Sales, B2B Account Management, customer service, or Consultative Inside Sales. (Experience with property management, logistics, facility maintenance, or commercial construction trades is a massive plus).
Sales Acumen: Proven ability to manage a pipeline, handle price-resistance or objections, and confidently close a deal on an inbound call or email follow-up.
Language: Flawless, professional-level English (both written and spoken) with excellent active listening and negotiation skills.
Tech Literacy: Comfortable and efficient with standard business tools:
Modern CRM systems (Hubspot, Salesforce, etc), work-order databases, or facility management platforms (ServiceChannel, Fexa, Corrigo, etc.)
Communication and ticketing software (Slack, Zendesk, or similar)
Workspace environments (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365)
Video conferencing (Zoom, Google Meet)
Workspace: A dedicated, quiet private home office free of background noise, paired with a reliable high-speed internet connection and a high-performing laptop/computer.
Location: Permanently located in Mexico, legally authorized to work, and fully available to work California (PST) business hours year-round.

Compensation & Benefits
Monthly Salary: $950–$1,100 USD monthly salary.
Stability: This is a stable, long-term contract role with a guaranteed base salary focused on consistent execution and client retention, rather than a fluctuating commission structure.
Perks: Monthly healthcare stipend, ongoing sales and operational training, and access to modern AI-enablement tools to streamline your daily workflow.




What We Provide
Full onboarding and technical training regarding commercial doors, common industrial facility issues, and specialized pricing matrices.
Clear process workflows, email templates, playbooks, and standard service guidelines.
Dedicated CRM access and optimized support tracking tools.
A collaborative, supportive team environment with a growing, high-integrity U.S. service company.

title: Product Marketing Specialist (Product Planning)
description:
About the job

Shape the future of healthcare innovation across Latin America.




At OMRON Healthcare, we're looking for a Product Marketing Specialist (Product Planning) to help define the next generation of healthcare products across the Latin American market.




This is more than a product marketing role.

You'll partner with global teams in Japan and cross-functional leaders across the region to identify market opportunities, evaluate new product innovations, and lead product launches that improve people's lives.




From concept to commercialization, you'll play a key role in shaping our product portfolio and bringing innovative healthcare solutions to market.




What you'll do

✅ Lead the product lifecycle management for assigned product categories across Latin America.

✅ Support new product planning and commercialization from concept through market launch.

✅ Analyze market trends, customer needs, competitive activity, and pricing to identify business opportunities.

✅ Develop product positioning and launch plans aligned with regional business objectives.

✅ Collaborate with Global Product Planning teams in Japan to evaluate and introduce new products into the LATAM portfolio.

✅ Coordinate cross-functional initiatives with Sales, Marketing, Medical Marketing, Regulatory Affairs, Supply Chain, Finance, and Customer Service.

✅ Monitor portfolio performance and recommend product lifecycle strategies to maximize growth and profitability.

✅ Support pricing strategy, product documentation, packaging, labeling, and commercialization readiness.







What we're looking for




✔ Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Engineering, Life Sciences, or a related field.

✔ Advanced English with confidence communicating directly with global stakeholders.

✔ +3 years of experience in Product Marketing, Product Planning, Product Management, Brand Management, Category Management, or Portfolio Management.

✔ Experience supporting new product launches and product lifecycle management.

✔ Strong analytical skills with experience conducting market research, competitive analysis, and business planning.

✔ Experience working with cross-functional teams in a multinational environment.




✔ Strong project management, communication, and organizational skills.




Why OMRON Healthcare?

At OMRON Healthcare, innovation starts with our people.

This role offers a unique opportunity to work directly with global Product Planning teams, influence the future product portfolio for Latin America, and help bring meaningful healthcare innovations to millions of consumers.

If you're passionate about innovation, product strategy, and making a real business impact, we'd love to hear from you.




📍 Location: Mexico City, Mexico (Hybrid)




Apply today and help shape the future of healthcare innovation.

Live the OMRON experience and shape the future with US!

Review performance and translate the numbers into business metrics clients can act on.
Serve as the primary point of contact for client calls and issue resolution.
Coach internal team members on email strategy and account management best practices.




This Is for You If...

Client-First: You make clients feel genuinely taken care of.
Sharp Eye: You catch the error before it goes out, every time.
Quick on Your Feet: When a client asks a hard question, you already have an answer.
Ownership-Minded: Your accounts are your accounts - you see them through to results.




Skills & Experience




Must-Haves:

3+ years as an Email Account Manager or Account Manager
Hands-on Klaviyo experience (a technical assessment is part of this process)
Experience managing eCommerce clients
Strong soft skills in order to guide your team
Excellent English skills (C2 level)




Nice-to-Haves:

Experience working inside a marketing or email agency
List segmentation and email deliverability experience
Experience using AI tools for copywriting, analysis, or workflow automation
Email design experience
Analytics experience




What We Offer

Schedule: Remote, Monday-Friday, hours overlapping with Central Time (CST)
Compensation: $3,000-$3,500 USD/month
Team: Small, close-knit team where your wins are everyone's wins




About Us




We're a young, tight-knit team built around great work and good energy.

No corporate layers.

No ego.




Just a group of people who care about email, care about clients, and actually enjoy working together.




You won't be managing 40 accounts here. You'll own a handful, know them inside out, and see what great email marketing actually looks like.




We'd love for you to join us!




Submit your application and we'll be in touch.




Note: Only resumes in English will be taken into consideration.




In the form, please respond "GROTTO" to the "Why should we consider YOU for this position?"

question.




Important Note: This is a contractor position, not an employee role.

description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

You'll work directly with the Growth and Engagement team managing three LATAM markets - Colombia, Perú, and Costa Rica - supporting data analysis, dashboard reporting, and the day-to-day operational execution of growth initiatives. This is a hands-on role with real ownership: you'll be working with actual business data to help drive decisions across user acquisition, engagement, and promotions

In this role, you'll be...


Implementing growth and engagement strategies end-to-end - acquisition, user recovery, frequency, and promotional campaigns - coordinating across CRM, User Ops, and B-side teams
Maintaining active performance dashboards, flag anomalies, and ensure the team has consistent visibility across markets
Building and run SQL queries for user segmentation, engagement tracking, and churn analysis
Translating data outputs into clear, concise business insights for the team



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Industrial Engineering, Mathematics, Economics, Actuarial Science, Computer Science
Excel intemidate to advanced 
SQL Basic to intermediate 
Eagerness to learn
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Interest in data-driven decision making and business strategy
Ability to communicate insights clearly and effectively
Attention to detail and structured thinking
A proactive mindset and willingness to learn in a fast-moving environment



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

title: Customer Service

description:
About the job

Why Valtech?

At Valtech, we are the experience innovation company. We help brands create meaningful connections with their customers through data, technology, creativity, and human-centered experiences. We work in a collaborative, multicultural environment where continuous learning, innovation, and customer focus are at the core of everything we do.

We are currently looking for a Customer Service Specialist to join our team and support a global consumer brand by delivering exceptional customer experiences and ensuring effective complaint management across multiple service channels.

The Opportunity

As a Customer Service Specialist, you will be responsible for managing customer interactions across multiple communication channels, ensuring accurate complaint registration, reporting, and resolution follow-up. You will play a key role in maintaining data quality, identifying trends, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to improve customer satisfaction and operational processes.

This role requires strong communication skills, attention to detail, analytical thinking, and a customer-centric mindset.

What You'll Do

Customer Support & Complaint Management


Manage assigned customer service channels, including phone, WhatsApp, and email.
Actively listen to customer concerns and provide professional, empathetic, and satisfactory responses.
Collect and document customer and consumer feedback, complaints, and inquiries with accuracy and completeness.
Consolidate complaints and comments gathered from community managers, bots, conversation management tools, and social channels.
Classify and organize complaint information according to defined reporting standards.
Register and track complaints within client and quality management systems.


Reporting & Data Management


Generate detailed complaint reports and communicate findings to the appropriate stakeholders.
Ensure consistency, accuracy, and alignment of information between customer service and quality teams.
Maintain high standards of data integrity and documentation.
Analyze complaint data and identify recurring trends, patterns, and improvement opportunities.


Cross-Functional Collaboration


Coordinate with quality, operations, support, and other internal teams to support complaint resolution processes.
Follow up on replacements, warranty claims, and customer cases to ensure timely resolution.
Partner with quality teams to drive continuous improvement initiatives based on customer feedback and complaint insights.
Contribute to process optimization through data-driven recommendations.


What We’re Looking For

Must-Have Skills & Experience


Experience in customer service, customer support, complaint management, or related roles.
Experience managing multiple customer communication channels such as phone support, messaging platforms, and email.
Strong written and verbal communication skills.
Experience working with customer service and ticketing platforms (e.g., Zendesk or similar).
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets for data management and reporting.
Ability to classify, organize, and maintain large volumes of customer information accurately.
Strong attention to detail and commitment to data quality.
Customer-first mindset with strong problem-solving capabilities.
Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.


Nice-to-Have Skills


Experience working with Quality Management Systems (QMS) or complaint tracking platforms.
Knowledge of reporting and visualization tools such as Looker Studio.
Experience using social media management and conversation platforms such as Emplifi, Hootsuite, or similar tools.
Experience analyzing consumer feedback and identifying operational improvement opportunities.
Familiarity with warranty and replacement management processes.


Soft Skills


Active listening and empathy.
Strong customer orientation and service mindset.
Excellent organizational and time-management skills.
Effective communication across different stakeholder groups.
Proactive approach to problem-solving.
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Team-player attitude and collaborative mindset.


What Success Looks Like


Customer complaints are accurately documented and resolved efficiently.
Information remains consistent across customer service and quality teams.
Reports are delivered accurately and on time.
Emerging customer issues and trends are proactively identified.
Customer satisfaction, trust, and loyalty are continuously strengthened through exceptional service delivery.


Our Commitment to You

At Valtech, you'll be part of a global team passionate about creating exceptional experiences. We foster an inclusive culture where diverse perspectives are valued, and where every team member has opportunities to learn, grow, and make a meaningful impact.

Ready to create better experiences and help drive customer satisfaction? We'd love to hear from you.
