description:
About the job

About Charly Agency

 Charly Agency is a growing digital agency specializing in web design, UX/UI, branding, ecommerce, and development for clients primarily in the US. Operating globally with offices in San Francisco and Barcelona, we partner with brands ranging from startups to enterprises. Our team is spread across Europe and Latin America and we are scaling fast.




About the Role

 We are looking for a freelance copywriter to join our pool of creative collaborators. You will write across brand, web, and marketing, working closely with our design and strategy team to bring client projects to life through sharp, purposeful copy.

This is not a beginner role. We want someone who can take a brief, understand the business behind it, and produce copy that is clear, purposeful, and built to convert — without hand-holding. Mistakes happen, but high quality, great communication, and honesty are non-negotiable. No vague communication, no hiding behind "I was waiting for feedback."




What You'll Do

Write website copy across homepages, landing pages, product pages, and about pages
Develop brand voice guidelines and messaging frameworks
Write case studies, blog posts, and marketing content
Collaborate with designers to ensure copy and design work together




What We're Looking For

Strong portfolio of web and brand copywriting
Excellent written English, this is non-negotiable
Experience writing for DTC, SaaS, B2B, or CPG brands is a plus
Comfortable delivering quickly under tight deadlines without sacrificing quality
Clear and thoughtful approach to using AI in your workflow
Reliable, communicative, and comfortable working async
Eager to learn, open to direction, and quick on feedback
Agency experience is a strong plus




About Us

 Charly is a creative agency with a warm, international team that takes the work seriously without taking ourselves too seriously. We collaborate across time zones, support each other, and care a lot about doing great work for clients we genuinely like. If you are kind, talented, and ambitious, you will fit right in.




To Apply, send:

Your strongest copywriting samples (website, landing page, or brand copy preferred)
Examples of projects you wrote for and your role in them
Your availability and preferred working hours
Your expected rate (hourly or per project)

title: Associate Brand Manager
skills: Strategic Brand Planning and Insight Analysis : Actively drives the development, execution, and monitoring of annual brand plans while continually analyzing key performance indicators, industry trends, and competitor activities to deliver periodic brand reviews and actionable strategic recommendations.

Integrated Communication and Media Management : Coordinates end-to-end brand communication and media plans across all paid media, experiential activation, and public relations platforms, interfacing directly with agencies from initial creative briefing through to comprehensive final campaign evaluations.

Cross-Functional Commercial Collaboration : Serves as the primary strategic liaison between Sales, Customer Marketing, Global, and Regional teams to pitch marketing initiatives, facilitate key market visits, and uncover collaborative commercial growth opportunities.

Experiential Execution and Brand Advocacy : Leads total execution of brand experiential platforms and value-added packaging projects, maintaining strict brand guardianship across all channels to ensure the trademark is expressed consistently.

Financial and Administrative Performance Management : Manages the operational marketing budget, including comprehensive profit and loss monitoring, monthly advertising and promotion spend management, purchase order generation, and thorough invoice control.

Strategic Relationship and Agency Governance : Directs daily workflows and fosters robust partnerships with internal departments and external creative, PR, and media agencies to ensure all strategic communication output satisfies core business imperatives.

, : Controls assigned project life cycles from resource allocation to closure, leading robust post-evaluation reviews to implement key learnings that continuously optimize overall marketing efficiency.
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a closely related commercial field.
Professional Marketing Experience: Minimum 3 years of proven brand-building, portfolio development, and marketing success stories within fast-moving consumer goods global enterprises.

Analytical and Financial Competency: Strong numerical skills with a demonstrated ability to interpret Nielsen and ISCAM market research data, manage brand profit and loss structures, and optimize commercial performance metrics.

Strategic Communication and Language Skills: Intermediate professional proficiency in written and spoken English, paired with a demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional global brand teams in multicultural environments.
Integrated Creative and Digital Mastery: Technical understanding of modern consumer digital marketing frameworks and contemporary multimedia production trends to drive innovative brand activations.
Experience: preferably in the Wine & Spirits, ready-to-drink (RTD), beer, or FMCG industries.
Project Management: Strong project management skills to handle multiple initiatives simultaneously.
Time Management: Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.

Manejo de Excel y herramientas de seguimiento y control de campañas.

Ejecutar la compra de medios tradicionales (TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas) de acuerdo con los planes aprobados por el cliente.
Gestionar la generación y seguimiento de órdenes de compra en los sistemas internos de la compañía.
Coordinar el envío de materiales creativos y dar seguimiento con medios y proveedores para la correcta implementación de campañas.
Solicitar, recopilar y validar testigos para asegurar la correcta transmisión o publicación de las campañas.
Monitorear campañas activas y dar seguimiento a incidencias durante su ejecución.
Realizar conciliaciones de campañas verificando que la ejecución coincida con lo planeado y contratado.
Gestionar el cierre administrativo de campañas y órdenes de compra para el proceso de facturación.
Elaborar reportes post-buy y análisis de resultados de campaña.
Un entorno laboral positivo y colaborativo, basado en el respeto y el trabajo en equipo.
Excelentes beneficios que promueven tu bienestar personal y tu desarrollo profesional.
Prestaciones superiores a las de la ley.
Un espacio seguro y libre de discriminación, donde cada voz es valorada y cada persona realmente importa.
description:
About the job

Acerca de nosotros




Somos una agencia global, especialista en medios, marketing y tecnología. Líderes en el ramo con presencia en más de 100 países. Creamos soluciones integrales para todos nuestros clientes de forma rápida y eficaz.




Nuestra búsqueda constante de mejorar en lo que hacemos comienza contactando con personas como tú.




OMG te invita a unirte a nuestro equipo como: Ejecutivo de medios offline




¿Qué buscamos?




Buscamos un perfil con experiencia en la ejecución y seguimiento de campañas de medios tradicionales dentro de agencias de medios o centrales de medios, con interés en desarrollarse en un entorno dinámico y colaborativo.




Licenciatura en Mercadotecnia, Publicidad, Comunicación, Administración o afines.
Experiencia mínima de 2 años en implementación, ejecución y seguimiento de campañas offline.
Experiencia indispensable en agencias de medios o centrales de medios.
Conocimiento de medios tradicionales como TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas.
Inglés intermedio.
Manejo de Excel y herramientas de seguimiento y control de campañas.




¿Cuáles son las principales actividades?




Apoyar en la elaboración de planes tácticos mediante análisis de audiencias, competencia y tendencias de mercado.
Ejecutar la compra de medios tradicionales (TV, Radio, OOH, Prensa y Revistas) de acuerdo con los planes aprobados por el cliente.
Gestionar la generación y seguimiento de órdenes de compra en los sistemas internos de la compañía.
Coordinar el envío de materiales creativos y dar seguimiento con medios y proveedores para la correcta implementación de campañas.
Solicitar, recopilar y validar testigos para asegurar la correcta transmisión o publicación de las campañas.
Monitorear campañas activas y dar seguimiento a incidencias durante su ejecución.
Realizar conciliaciones de campañas verificando que la ejecución coincida con lo planeado y contratado.
Gestionar el cierre administrativo de campañas y órdenes de compra para el proceso de facturación.
Elaborar reportes post-buy y análisis de resultados de campaña.




¿Qué ofrecemos?




Un entorno laboral positivo y colaborativo, basado en el respeto y el trabajo en equipo.
Excelentes beneficios que promueven tu bienestar personal y tu desarrollo profesional.
Prestaciones superiores a las de la ley.
Un espacio seguro y libre de discriminación, donde cada voz es valorada y cada persona realmente importa.




Si estás buscando más que solo un empleo y quieres formar parte de una comunidad que te inspira y te impulsa a alcanzar tu máximo potencial, ¡nos encantaría conocerte!




En OMG NO discriminamos por razón de raza, origen étnico, edad, sexo, género, estado civil, ideología, opiniones políticas, nacionalidad, religión, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género o cualquier otra condición personal, física o social. A través de ello, construimos una cultura incluyente, de respeto y diversa.

title: Webinar Specialist
skills: Davide Delgrossi, Founder and CEO, ex Google, CEMS and Rotterdam School of Management Alumnus
Diego Beccarelli, Co-Founder and COO, ex Meta (Facebook) and Roland Berger, CEMS and London School of Economics Alumnus.
Develop and implement guidelines for conducting webinars.
Select and implement the most appropriate web conferencing technology.
Create, maintain, and execute a webinar schedule.
Organize contents and follow up for each webinar.
Work closely with the account manager team to ensure the successful organization of all webinars.
Work with creators to set and organize a monthly webinar plan
Proficiency in English, and knowledge of more languages is a plus
Understanding of Digital Marketing
Great time management
Knowledge of Canva and Capcut
Strong communication skills to interact with clients of all backgrounds and educational levels.
Flexible working hours required in case of urgency or business need.
Positive, proactive approach and problem-solving attitude.
Salary: up to 600 USD / monthly
Location: Latam (Full Remote)
Working hours: Full-time 40h/week
Contract: Freelance contract
Start Time: ASAP
We're a small team, so if you like more established companies, this role isn’t for you. You'll help create our company's culture.
We're an fast growing scaleup. Projects and priorities are likely to shift. You see this as an opportunity, not a problem.
You should be comfortable with navigating uncertainty.
WeLearn is a pro-startup, pro-tech organization. If that’s not your thing, this isn’t the place for you.
description:
About the job

Who We Are

WeLearn is an escale-up company, founded by two former Google and Facebook strategists and a project manager experiencing extremely rapid growth. At WeLearn, we partner with content creators and influencers and we support them in running their businesses.

We are an extremely motivated, ambitious, and passionate team.

We are looking for talented and driven individuals who want to join a vibrant company like no other.

About The Founders


Davide Delgrossi, Founder and CEO, ex Google, CEMS and Rotterdam School of Management Alumnus
Diego Beccarelli, Co-Founder and COO, ex Meta (Facebook) and Roland Berger, CEMS and London School of Economics Alumnus.



What You Will Do


Develop and implement guidelines for conducting webinars.
Select and implement the most appropriate web conferencing technology.
Create, maintain, and execute a webinar schedule.
Organize contents and follow up for each webinar.
Work closely with the account manager team to ensure the successful organization of all webinars.
Work with creators to set and organize a monthly webinar plan



Required Skills And Experience


Proficiency in English, and knowledge of more languages is a plus
Understanding of Digital Marketing
Great time management
Knowledge of Canva and Capcut
Strong communication skills to interact with clients of all backgrounds and educational levels.
Flexible working hours required in case of urgency or business need.
Positive, proactive approach and problem-solving attitude.



Our Offer And Benefits


Salary: up to 600 USD / monthly 
Location: Latam (Full Remote) 
Working hours: Full-time 40h/week
Contract: Freelance contract
Start Time: ASAP



WHY YOU MIGHT *NOT* BE EXCITED ABOUT US


We're a small team, so if you like more established companies, this role isn’t for you. You'll help create our company's culture.
We're an fast growing scaleup. Projects and priorities are likely to shift. You see this as an opportunity, not a problem.
You should be comfortable with navigating uncertainty.
WeLearn is a pro-startup, pro-tech organization. If that’s not your thing, this isn’t the place for you.



If you got this far down the list, you must be interested. While you may not possess all of the experience and skills we are looking for, passion for the role and a strong motivation go a long way. And…you have a thirst for learning, you are ambitious, and you like working with a team who shares those attributes.

About Us

At WeLearn we believe the human capital is the best asset of a company, hence you will interview directly with the Founders to whom you will be able to ask any question and who will tell you more about the project, their vision and your potential career path. If you love social media, you like to be surrounded by young, driven and like minded people and would like to start off your career in a tech startup with unlimited potential of growth, you are in the right place and we couldn’t be more excited to have you in our team.

WeLearn is a recently created startup, founded by two former Google and Facebook Strategist and Project Manager experiencing extremely rapid growth. At WeLearn we partner with influencers and content creators and we support them in running their businesses.

description:
About the job

Acerca del Grupo QuintoAndar

Somos el Grupo QuintoAndar, el mayor ecosistema inmobiliario de América Latina. Guiados por un propósito compartido de ayudar a las personas a amar el lugar donde viven, contamos con un portafolio diversificado de marcas y soluciones en diferentes países de América Latina y también con un Hub de Tecnología en Portugal. Desarrollamos tecnologías e innovación para transformar e impulsar la experiencia de vivienda en su totalidad.

Juntas, nuestras marcas líderes ofrecen soluciones que cubren todas las etapas del proceso de viviendar: Inmuebles24 (México), Zonaprop (Argentina), Adondevivir y Urbania (Perú), Plusvalía (Ecuador), ImovelWeb y QuintoAndar (Brasil).

Con el apoyo de un equipo de inversionistas y consultores de clase mundial, como Kaszek, Qualcomm, General Atlantic y SoftBank, QuintoAndar Group está actualmente valorado en más de 5.100 millones de dólares y sigue creciendo año tras año.

Aquí trabajarás con los mejores profesionales del mercado, en un entorno que respira innovación, colaboración y alto rendimiento. Para conocer más sobre nuestra historia, visita https://grupoquintoandar.com/es/.

Ubicación y Modelo de Trabajo Híbrido

Nuestro equipo trabaja bajo el modelo "híbrido", siendo necesario estar presencialmente en la oficina, ubicada en Buenos Aires.

Etapas del Proceso Selectivo:

Las etapas de nuestros procesos de selección tienen como objetivo evaluar tus experiencias y brindarte la oportunidad de conocer a nuestros equipos y oportunidades de carrera, y están estructuradas en los siguientes pasos:


Application Review
People Interview
Hiring Manager Interview
Case
Stakeholder Interview
Offer


Acerca del puesto 

El Analista de Branding será responsable de coordinar con el equipo de medios para implementar estrategias de marketing en todos los canales (TV, OOH/Vía Pública, Digital, Redes Sociales), asegurando una ejecución oportuna y lanzamientos a tiempo. El rol incluye gestionar los informes de rendimiento de las campañas (OOH, TV y Digital) en colaboración con el equipo de medios para fundamentar las decisiones de marca, así como generar presentaciones exhaustivas para el seguimiento de resultados.

Además, el Analista supervisará el contenido orgánico de las redes sociales mediante la revisión de materiales y la gestión de publicaciones en coordinación con agencias creativas externas. La posición también implica preparar informes de gastos mensuales para asegurar el cumplimiento de los objetivos financieros de B2C, garantizando al mismo tiempo el uso correcto de las pautas de la marca en todos los puntos de contacto.

Responsabilidades 


Implementación de estrategias en todos los canales (TV, OOH/Vía Pública, Digital, Redes Sociales), asegurando una correcta ejecución y entregas a tiempo. 
Gestionar, junto al equipo de medios, los informes de rendimiento de las campañas de OOH, TV y Digital para fundamentar las decisiones de marca. 
Generar presentaciones ejecutivas para el seguimiento de resultados y del rendimiento de las campañas. 
Supervisar el contenido orgánico en los canales de redes sociales, incluyendo la revisión de materiales y la publicación, en coordinación con agencias creativas externas. 
Preparar informes de gastos mensuales para asegurar el cumplimiento de los objetivos financieros y de inversión de B2C. 
Garantizar el uso correcto de las pautas de la marca (brand guidelines) en todos los entregables de comunicación. 

Buscamos personas con estas características:


Experiencia en marketing dentro de una empresa (del lado del cliente/anunciante). 
Experiencia en la gestión de briefs y en el seguimiento de resultados. 
Experiencia de trabajo con agencias de publicidad y equipos creativos. 
Comprensión de los KPIs de marca (ej. awareness/reconocimiento, consideración, preferencia) y métricas de medios (ej. alcance, frecuencia, CTR, CPM). 
Dominio de Google Slides (Presentaciones) y Spreadsheets (Hojas de cálculo). 
Perfil proactivo, organizado, colaborativo y orientado a resultados, con capacidad para gestionar múltiples proyectos de forma simultánea. 


Importante:


¡Nuestro proceso de selección comienza con el registro! Si realmente deseas formar parte de nuestro equipo, asegúrate de completar esta primera etapa. Revisamos cada postulación con atención y siempre damos una respuesta, aunque la persona no siga en el proceso. 
Toda la comunicación se realiza por correo electrónico, así que estate atento a nuestros mensajes y libera el dominio @quintoandar.com.br para que nuestros correos no terminen en la carpeta de spam.


Beneficios


Vales de Despensa
Apoyo Teletrabajo
Seguro Médico
Seguro de Vida
Aguinaldo - 30 días
Prima Vacacional
Licencia Parental extendida
Día libre por cumpleaños, Día del Padre y Día de la Madre


Diversidad e Inclusión en Grupo QuintoAndar

Valoramos la diversidad y queremos que todas las personas se sientan bienvenidas aquí, independientemente de su edad, identidad de género, orientación sexual, raza, color, etnia, origen, discapacidad, religión o cualquier otra característica. ¡Todas nuestras vacantes están abiertas para todas las personas! Verá que hay algunas preguntas sobre diversidad en el formulario de inscripción. En las vacantes de acción afirmativa, la información podrá ser utilizada para verificar su alineación con el público objetivo de la oportunidad, pudiendo, en esos casos, tener carácter eliminatorio. Para las vacantes no afirmativas, estos datos se utilizarán de forma anónima, exclusivamente para monitorear y mejorar nuestras prácticas de inclusión en los procesos de selección y sin impacto en su candidatura.

Privacidad y Protección de Datos

El Grupo QuintoAndar actúa de conformidad con las leyes de privacidad y protección de datos, y garante la seguridad de sus datos personales. Para saber más, consulte nuestro Aviso de Privacidad para Personas Candidatas. Si tiene dudas o desea ejercer sus derechos como titular de los datos, póngase en contacto con nosotros a través de nuestro Canal de Atención.

title: Partner Marketing Coordinator
skills: This position will be remote in Mexico
Reports to: Marketing Director
Project Management & Execution (Primary Ownership)
Manage day-to-day execution of partner marketing initiatives, ensuring all projects are delivered on time and aligned with objectives
Build and maintain project plans, timelines, and task tracking across multiple campaigns and programs
Coordinate cross-functional workflows between marketing, sales, creative, and partner teams
Track progress against deadlines and proactively follow up to ensure tasks are completed
Identify risks, bottlenecks, or delays early and communicate updates to stakeholders
Ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and are completed with accuracy
Partner Communications & Coordination
Support day-to-day communication with partner marketing counterparts, ensuring timely and clear responses
Coordinate campaign details, timelines, and deliverables with partners
Assist in drafting and sending partner communications, including emails, updates, and campaign materials
Maintain organized records of partner communications and engagement history
Support distribution of marketing assets, toolkits, and resources to partners
Help ensure partners have what they need to successfully execute campaigns
Campaign & Content Coordination
Coordinate execution of co-marketing campaigns across channels (email, events, webinars, digital, etc.)
Manage timelines and delivery of campaign assets, ensuring alignment with brand and messaging guidelines
Track content usage and ensure assets are properly organized and accessible
Support updates and maintenance of partner-facing and internal marketing materials
Assist in adapting or formatting content for partner use (slides, one-pagers, emails, etc.)
Program Tracking & Documentation
Maintain accurate and up-to-date tracking systems for campaigns, partners, and deliverables
Ensure all project details, timelines, and statuses are clearly documented and accessible
Track partner program activity, campaign participation, and execution status
Maintain organized documentation across tools and systems to support visibility and alignment
Support onboarding documentation and process guides for partner programs
Reporting & Performance Support
Assist in gathering and organizing data related to campaign and partner performance
Maintain reporting trackers for key metrics such as leads, engagement, and pipeline contribution
Support preparation of recurring reports and summaries for internal stakeholders
Ensure data accuracy and consistency across reporting systems
Help identify trends or gaps based on performance data
1+ years of experience in marketing coordination, project management, or similar roles
Strong organizational and project management skills
Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously
Basic experience with marketing, project management and CRM tools
Basic skills in email/HTML, Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, WordPress or similar to support creative development
Experience supporting partner, channel, or co-marketing programs
Familiarity with campaign execution across multiple marketing channels
Experience with budget management and campaign performance reporting
description:
About the job

We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Partner Marketing Coordinator to support the execution of Weave’s partner marketing programs and initiatives.

This role is execution-focused and plays a critical part in ensuring campaigns, communications, and partner initiatives are delivered on time, accurately, and with high quality. The Coordinator will manage day-to-day project workflows, support partner communications, and maintain systems and processes that keep programs running smoothly.

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, is exceptionally detail-oriented, and is comfortable managing multiple projects while coordinating across internal teams and external partners.


This position will be remote in Mexico 
Reports to: Marketing Director 


What You Will Own


 Project Management & Execution (Primary Ownership)
Manage day-to-day execution of partner marketing initiatives, ensuring all projects are delivered on time and aligned with objectives
Build and maintain project plans, timelines, and task tracking across multiple campaigns and programs
Coordinate cross-functional workflows between marketing, sales, creative, and partner teams
Track progress against deadlines and proactively follow up to ensure tasks are completed
Identify risks, bottlenecks, or delays early and communicate updates to stakeholders
Ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and are completed with accuracy
 Partner Communications & Coordination
Support day-to-day communication with partner marketing counterparts, ensuring timely and clear responses
Coordinate campaign details, timelines, and deliverables with partners
Assist in drafting and sending partner communications, including emails, updates, and campaign materials
Maintain organized records of partner communications and engagement history
Support distribution of marketing assets, toolkits, and resources to partners
Help ensure partners have what they need to successfully execute campaigns
 Campaign & Content Coordination
Coordinate execution of co-marketing campaigns across channels (email, events, webinars, digital, etc.)
Manage timelines and delivery of campaign assets, ensuring alignment with brand and messaging guidelines
Track content usage and ensure assets are properly organized and accessible
Support updates and maintenance of partner-facing and internal marketing materials
Assist in adapting or formatting content for partner use (slides, one-pagers, emails, etc.)
 Program Tracking & Documentation
Maintain accurate and up-to-date tracking systems for campaigns, partners, and deliverables
Ensure all project details, timelines, and statuses are clearly documented and accessible
Track partner program activity, campaign participation, and execution status
Maintain organized documentation across tools and systems to support visibility and alignment
Support onboarding documentation and process guides for partner programs
 Reporting & Performance Support
Assist in gathering and organizing data related to campaign and partner performance
Maintain reporting trackers for key metrics such as leads, engagement, and pipeline contribution
Support preparation of recurring reports and summaries for internal stakeholders
Ensure data accuracy and consistency across reporting systems
Help identify trends or gaps based on performance data


What You Will Need to Accomplish the Job


1+ years of experience in marketing coordination, project management, or similar roles
Strong organizational and project management skills
Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously
Basic experience with marketing, project management and CRM tools


What Will Make Us Love You


Basic skills in email/HTML, Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, WordPress or similar to support creative development
Experience supporting partner, channel, or co-marketing programs
Familiarity with campaign execution across multiple marketing channels
Experience with budget management and campaign performance reporting


Employment with Weave is contingent upon the successful completion of a background check, conducted in accordance with applicable laws.

At Weave, we use Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools to help us work more efficiently and create a smoother candidate experience. AI may assist with things like writing job descriptions, scheduling interviews, or reviewing applications against job-related criteria. For additional information, please review the External AI Policy Statement available on our Careers page.

Weave is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where all individuals are valued and supported. We welcome anyone who is hungry to learn, problem-solve and progress regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know.

Beware of recruitment fraud. All official correspondence will occur through Weave branded email. We will never ask you to share bank account information, cash a check from us, or purchase software or equipment as part of your interview or hiring process.

title: Email Marketing Specialist (DTC Agency)
skills: Own the PM pipeline: manage our PM software to deliver emails on time. Chase approvals. Unblock blockers. Keep the weekly rhythm tight. Keep the team accountable.
Run the execution: build and maintain pop ups, flows, and campaigns.
QA everything: you're the last set of eyes before anything goes live. Links, segments, send times, etc. You check it.
Are relentlessly organized and fast
Have a sharp eye for mistakes — typos and broken links don't get past you
Follow up before anyone asks
Communicate clearly and directly
Have worked in eCommerce / DTC before
Have worked at an agency or on a fast-moving team

100% remote: but you must overlap with North American business hours
Paid in USD: reliably, every month
Long-term and stable: we want someone to grow with us for years, with real room to take on more as we scale
description:
About the job

About Bedford

We're an email marketing agency for North American eComm brands. Our standard is 10/10 work, and we're scaling fast!




Role Description

You will own everything that brings amazing emails to life: the execution, the timelines, and the quality control. You will be the operational backbone of 10-15 brands at once. 




You will own:

Own the PM pipeline: manage our PM software to deliver emails on time. Chase approvals. Unblock blockers. Keep the weekly rhythm tight. Keep the team accountable.
Run the execution: build and maintain pop ups, flows, and campaigns.
QA everything: you're the last set of eyes before anything goes live. Links, segments, send times, etc. You check it.




You're a fit if:

Are relentlessly organized and fast
Have a sharp eye for mistakes — typos and broken links don't get past you
Follow up before anyone asks
Communicate clearly and directly
Have worked in eCommerce / DTC before
Have worked at an agency or on a fast-moving team
(Bonus) Know Klaviyo or a similar ESP — flows, campaigns, pop-ups, segments, deliverability




More details:

100% remote: but you must overlap with North American business hours
Paid in USD: reliably, every month
Long-term and stable: we want someone to grow with us for years, with real room to take on more as we scale

title: Creator Manager - TikTok Shop
description:
About the job

Responsibilities
Team Intro
The commerce industry has seen tremendous growth in recent years and has become a hotly contested space amongst leading Internet companies, and its future growth cannot be underestimated.
With millions of loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better commerce experience to our users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join our operations team, together we can build an commerce ecosystem that is innovative, secure and intuitive for our users.

We are looking for a passionate and strategic Creator Manager to join our team. You will be responsible for discovering, incubating, and educating e-commerce creators, with a focus on helping vertical creators improve their sales performance. You will collaborate closely with industry teams to match high-potential creators with quality content formats, including short videos and live streaming. Additionally, you will support major campaigns, marketing initiatives, and creator education efforts by providing relevant content and guidance. A key part of your role will be working with the content moderation team to educate creators on platform policies and ensure compliance. 

Responsibilities: 
- Identify, onboard, and incubate e-commerce creators within specific verticals to drive sales growth. 
- Develop and implement strategies to scale creator success, leveraging data insights to guide decision-making. 
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Category, Marketing, Campaign operations) to match creators with suitable content opportunities and promotional activities. 
- Provide ongoing education and support to creators, helping them optimize content strategy, understand platform rules, and improve performance. 
- Work with the content moderation team to ensure creators adhere to platform guidelines and policies.

Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications:
- Strong strategic thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to translate data into actionable plans. 
- Service-oriented mindset, patience, and excellent communication skills to support and educate creators. 
- Fast learner who can quickly absorb information and effectively teach others. 
- Team player with a strong sense of responsibility and a positive, can-do attitude. 
- Proficient in data analysis and comfortable using metrics to drive decisions. 
 
Preferred Qualifications:
- 3+ years of experience in operations or partner management
- Able to establish contact, build up trust with creators, and provide complete support on platform training, creator engagement activities.

About TikTok
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.


Why Join Us
Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.
We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion
TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.


TikTok Accommodation
TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

About the job

NBCUniversal is one of the world's leading media and entertainment companies. We create world-class content, which we distribute across our portfolio of film, television, and streaming, and bring to life through our global theme park destinations, consumer products, and experiences. We own and operate leading entertainment and news brands, including NBC, NBC News, NBC Sports, Telemundo, NBC Local Stations, Bravo, and Peacock, our premium ad-supported streaming service. We produce and distribute premier filmed entertainment and programming through our powerhouse film and television studios, including Universal Pictures, DreamWorks Animation, and Focus Features, and the four global television studios under the Universal Studio Group banner, and operate industry-leading theme parks and experiences around the world through Universal Destinations & Experiences, including Universal Orlando Resort, home to Universal Epic Universe, and Universal Studios Hollywood. NBCUniversal is a subsidiary of Comcast Corporation. Visit www.nbcuniversal.com for more information.



Our impact is rooted in improving the communities where our employees, customers, and audiences live and work. description:
About the job

SEO/AEO Analyst with strong technical experience (WordPress)




Do you get excited when your site shows up in position 1?




Are you comfortable with WordPress?




This is a WordPress Developer/SEO hybrid position.




We are looking for a very detailed focus person who can optimize our sites for organic conversions.




You'll work with diverse clients and help keep the sites optimized.




And with a great team (C1 level English required)




If that sounds like you, read on.




The Role:




Build pages in accordance with SEO best practices (metadata, headers, alt text, interlinking, etc.) - we will provide targeted SEO copy.

Technical SEO creation and implementation with focus on schema and robots (bonus if you have AEO knowledge).

QA all elements and ensure mobile-first layouts and indexation.

Identify broken links, misconfigured tags, crawl inefficiencies, etc.




This Is for You If...




-> You're detail-obsessed: spot a missing alt text or a broken schema before anyone else even notices.




-> You're ownership-driven: if we give you a content map and a copy doc, and you'll run with it. No hand-holding needed.




-> You're craving a team environment: you like to work with fun people and are open to lending a hand when needed




Skills & Experience




Must-Haves:




+2 years of hands-on experience with WordPress and front-end development.
Strong HTML/CSS—you write clean, semantic markup.
On-page SEO: titles, meta, headings, alt text, and internal linking.
JSON-LD schema experience using Schema.org and the Rich Results Test.
Solid understanding of crawlability, indexability, canonicalization, and core web vitals.
Excellent English skills (C2 level).




Nice-to-Haves:




Experience with Webflow, Wix, Shopify, or straight HTML sites.
Familiarity with GA4, Google Tag Manager, and Search Console workflows.
Some knowledge of local SEO and Google Business Profile workflows.
Comfortable with a bit of JavaScript for things like FAQ accordions and basic UI tweaks.




What We Offer




Schedule: Remote, Monday–Friday, 9am to 5pm EST.

Compensation: $3,000 to $3,500 per month

Team: Working directly inside a multi-disciplinary SEO/AEO team







About Us:




GreenBanana SEO is at the edge of Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), helping brands get noticed in AI-driven search.




We're a fun, hard-working team that keeps things simple, communicates clearly, and delivers results.




If you crave working in a supportive team environment and growing in your AEO knowledge, this role will fill your cup.




Only resumes in English will be taken into consideration.




In the form, please respond "blueprint" to the "Why should we consider YOU for this position?" question.




Important Note: This is a contractor position, not an employee role.

title: Talent Account Executive 1
description:
About the job

LinkedIn is the world's largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We're also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that's built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.



Join us to transform the way the world works.





Job Description



This role will be based in Mexico City.



At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team. 



LinkedIn is looking for a Talent Solutions Account Executive I (TAE1) to join our New Business team in Mexico City. This role is focused on driving new customer acquisition across a high-volume SMB territory, building strong pipeline through outbound prospecting, and closing new business opportunities across Hiring and Learning solutions. 



Success in this role requires strong discipline in pipeline management, excellent time management, and the ability to prioritize effectively across a large number of accounts and opportunities. The ideal candidate is highly organized, action-oriented, collaborative, leverages AI and data to increase productivity, and thrives in a fast-paced, high-activity sales environment. While the territory is primarily SMB-focused, the ability to identify and close larger strategic opportunities is considered a strong differentiator. 



Responsibilities:



• Own new business acquisition within a defined SMB territory, ensuring strong account coverage and prioritization of the highest-potential opportunities 

• Develop and execute a territory strategy focused on scale, efficiency, and consistent pipeline generation 

• Generate pipeline through proactive outbound prospecting (self-prospection and in partnership with SDs + partners) and effectively manage inbound opportunities 

• Build and maintain a strong, healthy pipeline across all funnel stages, ensuring high activity, progression, and conversion 

• Manage a high volume of opportunities simultaneously, with strong organization, time management, and prioritization discipline 

• Run effective discovery conversations to understand customer needs and position Hiring and Learning solutions accordingly 

• Execute pilot-led sales motions, including onboarding, engagement, and conversion into long-term partnerships 

• Maintain accurate forecasting and high standards of CRM hygiene 

• Consistently meet or exceed quota targets through strong execution and disciplined funnel management 

• Identify and drive cross-sell opportunities, especially expanding into Learning solutions 

• Identify larger strategic opportunities within the territory and navigate them effectively when present 

• Leverage AI tools and data insights to improve productivity, prospecting quality, and deal execution 

• Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams (SDs, ADs, Marketing, Partners) to maximize opportunity creation and success 

• Share market insights and contribute to the development of team best practices





Qualifications



Basic Qualifications:



• Fluency in Spanish and English 

• 3+ years of sales experience 



Preferred Qualifications:



• Proven track record of closing new business in B2B/SaaS environments 

• Experience with HR tech, recruiting solutions, or software sales 

• Strong prospecting, organization, and pipeline management skills 

• Experience managing high-volume sales cycles with efficiency and consistency 

• Data-driven mindset with ability to prioritize and make informed decisions 



Suggested Skills 



• Pipeline Management 

• Territory Planning & Prioritization 

• Time & Volume Management 

• Prospecting Excellence 

• Pilot Management 

• AI Usage for Sales Productivity 

• Consultative / Value-Based Selling 

• Forecasting 

• Cross-functional Collaboration 

• Opportunity Qualification 





Additional Information



Global Data Privacy Notice and Compliance Posters for Job Candidates 



Please use this link to access documents that provide information about how LinkedIn handles the personal data of employees and job applicants, as well as the E-Verify Participation Notice and the Department of Justice Immigrant and Employee Rights Section Right to Work posters: https://www.linkedin.com/legal/candidate-portal.

description:
About the job

ON.energy is building the power infrastructure that makes the AI era possible. As AI demand surges past what the grid and traditional data centers can support, ON.energy provides a new class of power technology proven at gigawatt scale and trusted by the world’s leading cloud and AI companies. Our systems are already deployed across 2.5 GW of hyper-scale campuses, validated by top U.S. national labs, and certified for grid-safe operation by major utilities. With real products in the field, we’re scaling faster than the grid can, transforming power from a bottleneck into a competitive advantage for the companies building the future.

We are looking for a Marketing manager to design, execute, and lead the marketing strategy for ON.energy in the LATAM region, positioning the brand and its UPS solutions portfolio for Artificial Intelligence applications in markets with high demand for mission-critical infrastructure. Generate awareness, credibility, and qualified demand in a market where brand recognition is still emerging, reporting to the VP for LATAM and acting as the direct liaison between the region and the Corporate Marketing team in the U.S., ensuring global brand consistency with local relevance.


REPORTS TO: VP LATAM and VP MKT (US-based)
LOCATION: Mexico City, Mexico
MODALITY: In Person (travel availability required)
FUNCTIONAL LINK: Corporate Marketing (U.S.) – brand alignment, global guidelines, approval of regional materials and campaigns


Requirements


Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or related field. Master's degree or specialization in B2B Marketing or Commercial Management desirable.
Minimum 3 years in B2B marketing in technology, energy, infrastructure, or related sectors. Demonstrable experience in brand positioning in LATAM markets. Experience working in matrix structures or reporting to U.S.-based leadership is a plus.
Native Spanish. Advanced English (C1 or higher) – daily communication with corporate team in the U.S. Portuguese desirable.
B2B marketing and complex sales cycles (technical / capital-intensive solutions).
Content strategy and brand positioning on LinkedIn and B2B digital channels.
Lead generation and nurturing (HubSpot, Salesforce, or equivalent).
Event management, trade shows, and webinars in the LATAM region.
Marketing budget management and ROI metrics.
Tools: Adobe Suite / Canva Pro, Google Analytics, CRM and marketing automation platforms.

Brand Strategy & Positioning


Develop and execute the annual marketing plan for LATAM, aligned with the VP's commercial objectives and U.S. corporate guidelines.
Build ON.energy's positioning as a reference in UPS solutions for AI infrastructure in the region.
Adapt corporate messages and materials to the cultural and regulatory context of each LATAM market.

Design and run digital campaigns (LinkedIn Ads, email marketing, SEO/SEM) targeting decision-makers in datacenter, infrastructure, and IT.
Manage ON.energy's presence at trade shows, conferences, and industry events (Data Center Dynamics, Datacenter Forum LATAM, etc.).
Coordinate with the sales team on lead generation, qualification, and follow-up through CRM.


Content & Communications


Produce and manage technical-commercial content: case studies, whitepapers, product sheets, videos, and webinars on UPS for AI.
Manage ON.energy's digital channels in LATAM: LinkedIn, regional website, and sales materials.
Coordinate with local agencies in design, public relations, and specialized media.

Report weekly to the VP for LATAM on campaign progress, performance metrics (KPIs), and ROI of activities.
Act as the formal liaison between LATAM and Corporate Marketing (U.S.): align campaign calendars, request and adapt global assets, submit regional materials for approval, and ensure compliance with corporate brand guidelines.

description:
About the job

Job Title: Sales Operations Specialist (CRM & Pipeline Operations)

Location: Remote (LATAM, Philippines, or South Africa Preferred)

Salary: Up to $1,500/month (Depending on experience)

Schedule: US Business Hours (EST/CST)




Independent Contractor Position




About the Role

We are hiring a Sales Operations Specialist to own CRM management, pipeline coordination, lead follow-up, and sales process execution for a U.S.-based sales team.




This is not a basic admin role. This position is built for someone who understands how sales pipelines move, knows how to keep deals from stalling, and can maintain operational visibility across the entire sales process.




You will manage CRM hygiene, coordinate follow-ups, support estimate-to-close workflows, and improve sales operations through organization, process discipline, and automation.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, proactive, comfortable communicating with U.S. clients, and experienced supporting fast-moving sales teams remotely.




What You’ll Own

Manage and maintain CRM pipelines across inbound, outbound, and quoted opportunities

Experience building CRM automations or workflow improvements
Background in signage, printing, or visual communications industries
Familiarity with Google Workspace, Slack, and project management tools

Exposición a marcas y proyectos diversos.
Aprendizaje acelerado y portafolio sólido.

Si al leer esto pensaste “esto suena a mí”, nos va a encantar conocerte. 🙂

Aplica aquí o mándanos tu info a → andrea@papel-mache.com + hessler@papel-mache.com cc vicentec@papel-mache.com

Buscamos una compensación justa y alineada al perfil, con oportunidad de crecimiento conforme evoluciones dentro del equipo.

title: Financial Analyst, Lyft Ads
skills: Financial Close: Own month end processes and actualization of the Ads P&L, including revenue, expenses, and headcount, and ensure all data is accurate and organized efficiently.

FP&A Reporting: Drive variance analyses and forecasting for Finance and Ads leadership on a weekly basis. Own all budget, actuals, and forecast variance analyses and provide forward-looking insights on revenue/expense trends.
Budget Management: Approve and own spend across the rapidly growing business. Collaborate with procurement and business operations to understand vendor usage and ROI to the business.

Ads Reporting: Provide reporting for campaign margins, account growth, and sales rep efficiency routinely. Build relationships with cross functional teams to deliver well-rounded, thoughtful insights.
Executive Presentation: Translate dense data into clean, executive-ready Google Slides for VP- and C-suite reviews.
Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related quantitative field.
Strong accounting background preferred. FP&A and/or advertising experience is helpful but not required.
Advanced Excel/Google Sheets knowledge: you are able to comfortably dig through spreadsheets, even ones you have not built.
Curiosity and comfortability with ambiguity: you possess the ability to research and present your findings with little historicals and guidance.
Attention to detail: you are extremely thorough with your reviews and can understand the bigger picture from the data.
Professional fluency in English is required.
description:
About the job

At Lyft, our purpose is to serve and connect. We aim to achieve this by cultivating a work environment where all team members belong and have the opportunity to thrive.

Lyft Ads is one of the fastest-growing businesses within Lyft, building a first-of-its-kind mobility advertising platform. As the Financial Analyst, you'll be a core finance partner to a high-velocity, scaling business by translating complex commercial activity into clean financials, sharp insights, and executive-ready narratives. This role sits at the intersection of accounting rigor and strategic finance.

Responsibilities:


Financial Close: Own month end processes and actualization of the Ads P&L, including revenue, expenses, and headcount, and ensure all data is accurate and organized efficiently.
FP&A Reporting: Drive variance analyses and forecasting for Finance and Ads leadership on a weekly basis. Own all budget, actuals, and forecast variance analyses and provide forward-looking insights on revenue/expense trends.
Budget Management: Approve and own spend across the rapidly growing business. Collaborate with procurement and business operations to understand vendor usage and ROI to the business. 
Ads Reporting: Provide reporting for campaign margins, account growth, and sales rep efficiency routinely. Build relationships with cross functional teams to deliver well-rounded, thoughtful insights.
Executive Presentation: Translate dense data into clean, executive-ready Google Slides for VP- and C-suite reviews.


Experience:


Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related quantitative field.
Strong accounting background preferred. FP&A and/or advertising experience is helpful but not required.
Advanced Excel/Google Sheets knowledge: you are able to comfortably dig through spreadsheets, even ones you have not built.
Curiosity and comfortability with ambiguity: you possess the ability to research and present your findings with little historicals and guidance.
Attention to detail: you are extremely thorough with your reviews and can understand the bigger picture from the data.
Professional fluency in English is required.


Please submit your resume in English.

title: Founding Growth Lead
skills: If you've taken an app from quiet to growing and want to do it again as an owner, not an employee — message me.
description:
About the job

I'm hiring a Founding Growth Lead for TalkPilot.




TalkPilot is an AI conversation co-pilot for iOS, Mac, and Apple Watch. The product is live and it's good. Distribution is the problem — and that's the entire job.




I'm a strong builder and a weak distributor. I need the opposite of me: someone who wakes up thinking about acquisition channels, activation, and retention curves, and knows how to turn a launched app into a growing one.




What you'd own:

 → The full growth function — paid (Apple Search Ads, Meta), ASO, organic, content, lifecycle

 → Finding the one channel that actually works and pouring fuel on it

 → The numbers: CAC, install→paid conversion, retention




This is a founding role. The equity is real and meaningful. The salary is early-stage and below what a funded company pays — that's the trade for ownership. Mexico City preferred, remote possible for the right person.




If you've taken an app from quiet to growing and want to do it again as an owner, not an employee — message me.

description:
About the job

About Greether

Greether is an award-winning travel startup that empowers women to travel safer by connecting female travelers with verified, local women Greeters for safe, authentic, and sustainable travel experiences.

Operating in over 100 countries and 1,000+ cities, Greether is aligned with key Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), working to reduce safety risks for women while creating economic opportunities through technology and tourism.

Greether was named Startup of the Year at WTM London, selected as one of PhocusWire's Hot 25 Travel Startups, and recognized by the UNWTO Awake Tourism Challenge. The company has been featured in Forbes, USA Today, and Fast Company and is backed by leading organizations including a16z, Expedia Group, Mercury, and the Untours Foundation.




About the Role

We're looking for a highly organized, proactive, and curious Growth & Partnerships Intern to join our team.

This is a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience across partnerships, marketing, communications, community building, and startup operations. You will work closely with our leadership team and support initiatives that help grow Greether's global network of travelers, Greeters, ambassadors, and partners.

If you're passionate about travel, women's empowerment, relationship building, and learning how a fast-growing startup operates behind the scenes, we'd love to hear from you.

📌 Please note: This is a full-time internship (Monday to Friday, 9 AM–6 PM PST). We prioritize candidates based in Latin America and recent graduates or individuals seeking full-time professional experience.




Key Responsibilities

Support outreach and relationship-building efforts with potential partners, organizations, brands, tourism boards, and communities
Assist in managing and growing Greether's Brand Ambassador Program
Conduct research on potential partnership opportunities, events, destinations, and industry trends
Support the planning and execution of marketing and community-building campaigns
Assist with onboarding and engagement initiatives for Greeters and travelers
Help coordinate virtual and in-person events, and partnership activations
Support communications and follow-up with prospective collaborators and stakeholders
Contribute to content creation, storytelling, and community engagement initiatives
Assist with project coordination and operational tasks 




What We're Looking For

Recent graduate in marketing, communications, tourism, international relations, business, or a related field 
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities in a fast-paced startup environment
Comfortable conducting research and presenting findings clearly
Proactive, resourceful, and eager to learn
Interest in partnerships, marketing, community building, tourism, and social impact
Passion for women's empowerment, sustainable travel, and entrepreneurship
Available Monday to Friday, from 9 AM to 6 PM PST




Perks

Monthly stipend
Direct exposure to startup growth, partnerships, marketing, and operations
Opportunity to work closely with an award-winning global startup
Meaningful work that contributes to making travel safer and more inclusive
Networking opportunities with tourism leaders, partners, and communities worldwide
Potential for long-term growth within the company




📩 Interested?

Apply directly on LinkedIn AND send your CV to info@greether.com

We can't wait to hear from you!

title: Junior Media Buyer for a US Performance Marketing Agency (Remote)
skills: Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.
0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.
Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.
description:
About the job

Paired is a global staffing and recruiting agency that specializes in pairing remote work with top-tier talent!

We are dedicated to connecting talented individuals with remarkable companies in need of their skills. Our goal is to create fulfilling job opportunities for professionals around the world.

Our client:



Looking for a Junior Media Buyer who wants to learn the performance marketing craft properly. This is a hands-in-the-account role from day one for someone obsessed with what makes an ad account scale profitably, not just spend. You will work hand-in-hand with senior buyers to plan, launch, and optimize paid campaigns primarily on Meta, with growing responsibility on AppLovin / Axon.

You don't need years of experience, but you do need sharp instincts, comfort with numbers, and the drive to get great at this fast. You'll be building campaigns, reading data, spotting what's working, and learning to make confident scale/kill decisions across a portfolio of fast-growing DTC e-commerce brands.

This is a high-performance environment built for hungry, ambitious people who take real ownership of their accounts and treat client budgets like their own.

You'll be responsible for


Building, launching, and managing Meta campaigns (CBO/ABO structures, audiences, placements, creative testing).
Supporting and growing into independent buying on AppLovin / Axon.
Monitoring daily performance and flagging scaling opportunities, underperformers, and anomalies.
Running structured creative and audience tests, and documenting the results.
Pulling, organizing, and interpreting performance data to inform decisions, and producing clear weekly client reports.
Analyzing creative performance using soft metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC), benchmarking against account averages, and clearly communicating those reads to strategists and clients.
Helping maintain clean account hygiene, naming conventions, and tracking.


Requirements


0-2 years of hands-on paid media experience (internships, freelance, or running your own / your brand's ads all count).
Clear written communication in English.
Genuine fluency with Meta Ads Manager — you've built campaigns, not just read about them.
Strong numerical sense; comfortable living in spreadsheets and dashboards.
A direct-response mindset: you care about CPA, ROAS, and contribution margin, not vanity metrics.
Familiarity with DTC e-commerce, Shopify, and the fashion/beauty/lifestyle space.
Working knowledge of tracking and attribution tools (pixels, CAPI, ClickFlare, GA4, etc.).
Comfortable staying responsive when accounts demand it, including the occasional evening or weekend during launches or scaling pushes.
Availability during key EST windows to analyze performance and take action (scale, kill, pull back, etc.).
Nice to have


Experience with AdManage (strongly preferred).
Hands-on time with AppLovin / Axon or other programmatic / native platforms.
Basic understanding of creative.


Benefits


Competitive base salary.
Fully remote, full-time contractor role.
Learn direct-response media buying directly from senior operators managing significant spend.
Real ownership early—you won't be stuck pulling reports for a year.
Work across a diverse roster of scaling, fast-growing DTC brands in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.
A fast-paced team environment that rewards results and fosters growth into a senior media buyer role.

title: Remote Marketing Strategist
skills: Designs high-performance static and dynamic motion ads tailored specifically to the algorithms and specs of Meta, TikTok, and Google Display networks.
Produces short-form video content, kinetic typography, and animations (GIFs, motion graphics) designed to maximize engagement and watch time within paid channels.
Masters platform-specific technical requirements, striking a perfect balance between polished brand content and authentic, high-converting "UGC-style" aesthetics.
Architectures high-fidelity wireframes and designs for standalone landing pages, prioritizing Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and user experience (UX).
Creates visually engaging, responsive layouts for automated email lifecycle flows and editorial newsletters that maximize click-through rates (CTR).
Collaborates daily with the media buying team to audit performance data arrays, rapidly executing design iterations on "winning" assets to extend campaign longevity.
The "Conversion Eye": A profound understanding of visual hierarchy, direct-response design frameworks, and cognitive patterns that naturally guide a user’s eye toward a clear conversion event.
Multi-Disciplinary Toolbelt: Complete professional proficiency across Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and After Effects).
Speed & Operational Agility: A proven track record of maintaining exceptional aesthetic standards while operating comfortably at a high-velocity pace inside an agile marketing team.

Data-Informed Portfolio: A comprehensive design portfolio showcasing real-world marketing assets rather than abstract art. The candidate must be equipped to explain the analytical data, testing variables, and conversion "why" behind their design executions.

Workplace Infrastructure: Ownership of a high-performance computer setup capable of handling complex video rendering and multi-frame animation software, a dedicated home office workspace, and a stable, high-speed internet connection.
Practical experience working natively within landing page builders such as Webflow, Unbounce, or Instapage.
Foundational understanding of digital marketing frameworks, including multi-variable A/B testing principles and customer acquisition cost (CAC) goals.
Direct background supporting fast-scaling D2C, E-commerce, or B2G/B2B SaaS performance marketing structures.
Performance-Based Compensation Growth: A wide baseline salary band ($1,200 – $3,000 USD) that rewards top-tier technical capability, high qualifications, and exceptional asset delivery speeds.
Direct Growth Autonomy: Step out of rigid corporate design constraints into a performance-driven sandbox where your creative variations directly scale revenue.
Highly Collaborative Environment: Partner closely with data analysts and media buyers, gaining elite, real-time feedback loops on your design executions.
100% Remote Infrastructure: Long-term, secure full-time contractor engagement managed entirely from the comfort of a dedicated home office.
description:
About the job

HireLatam is a premier recruitment agency that places top Latin American talent in independent contractor roles in US companies. With a proven track record and a commitment to excellence, we're your trusted partner in the pursuit of career success. Our extensive network, personalized approach, and supportive guidance ensure that you're in the best hands to find your next job opportunity.




Job Title: Remote Marketing Strategist (100% Work From Home) 

Location: Remote from Latin America

Position Type: Full-time

Salary: $1,200 – $3,000 USD/month (Fully dependent on creative skill level, qualifications, and design output speed)

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Eastern Time (EST), featuring a structured 1-hour lunch break from 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM EST.




About our Client




Our Client is a fast-growing, data-driven enterprise that relies on cutting-edge digital acquisition to scale its market presence. Operating with a high-velocity, performance-first marketing team, they prioritize conversion metrics over vanity metrics. They foster an agile, collaborative remote environment where creative assets are constantly measured, iterated upon, and optimized to drive real business growth and pipeline value.




The Role




Our Client is seeking a high-output, conversion-oriented Performance Designer to take complete ownership of visual assets across the entire customer acquisition funnel. This is not a traditional branding role focused solely on aesthetics; it is a high-ownership position where design must directly drive performance. The successful candidate will blend creative mastery with analytical reasoning to engineer thumb-stopping social ads, high-converting landing page layouts, engaging email campaigns, and short-form motion graphics that systematically guide users toward a definitive Call to Action (CTA).




Key Responsibilities




Paid Media Ad Creative & Motion Design




Designs high-performance static and dynamic motion ads tailored specifically to the algorithms and specs of Meta, TikTok, and Google Display networks.
Produces short-form video content, kinetic typography, and animations (GIFs, motion graphics) designed to maximize engagement and watch time within paid channels.
Masters platform-specific technical requirements, striking a perfect balance between polished brand content and authentic, high-converting "UGC-style" aesthetics.




Web Layouts, Lifecycle Marketing & Iterative Testing




Architectures high-fidelity wireframes and designs for standalone landing pages, prioritizing Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and user experience (UX).
Creates visually engaging, responsive layouts for automated email lifecycle flows and editorial newsletters that maximize click-through rates (CTR).
Collaborates daily with the media buying team to audit performance data arrays, rapidly executing design iterations on "winning" assets to extend campaign longevity.







Qualifications, Skills, and Key Competencies




Required Qualifications




The "Conversion Eye": A profound understanding of visual hierarchy, direct-response design frameworks, and cognitive patterns that naturally guide a user’s eye toward a clear conversion event.
Multi-Disciplinary Toolbelt: Complete professional proficiency across Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite (specifically Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and After Effects).
Speed & Operational Agility: A proven track record of maintaining exceptional aesthetic standards while operating comfortably at a high-velocity pace inside an agile marketing team.
Data-Informed Portfolio: A comprehensive design portfolio showcasing real-world marketing assets rather than abstract art. The candidate must be equipped to explain the analytical data, testing variables, and conversion "why" behind their design executions.
Workplace Infrastructure: Ownership of a high-performance computer setup capable of handling complex video rendering and multi-frame animation software, a dedicated home office workspace, and a stable, high-speed internet connection.




Preferred Qualifications




Practical experience working natively within landing page builders such as Webflow, Unbounce, or Instapage.
Foundational understanding of digital marketing frameworks, including multi-variable A/B testing principles and customer acquisition cost (CAC) goals.
Direct background supporting fast-scaling D2C, E-commerce, or B2G/B2B SaaS performance marketing structures.




Benefits




Performance-Based Compensation Growth: A wide baseline salary band ($1,200 – $3,000 USD) that rewards top-tier technical capability, high qualifications, and exceptional asset delivery speeds.
Direct Growth Autonomy: Step out of rigid corporate design constraints into a performance-driven sandbox where your creative variations directly scale revenue.
Highly Collaborative Environment: Partner closely with data analysts and media buyers, gaining elite, real-time feedback loops on your design executions.
100% Remote Infrastructure: Long-term, secure full-time contractor engagement managed entirely from the comfort of a dedicated home office.

description:
About the job

Descripción de la empresa

En Doctoralia, nuestra misión es humanizar la experiencia de la salud a través de la tecnología. Como la plataforma líder en el mercado mexicano y referente global en soluciones SaaS para el sector médico, conectamos a millones de pacientes con especialistas, transformando la práctica clínica en una experiencia digital eficiente y centrada en el paciente.

Estamos buscando un Onboarding Customer Success Specialist apasionado, estratégico y con mentalidad de crecimiento para ser el aliado clave de nuestros especialistas.

Descripción del rol

Como Onboarding Customer Success Specialist, serás el aliado estratégico para los nuevos profesionales de la salud que se suman a nuestra plataforma. Tu misión será garantizar una experiencia de incorporación excepcional, promoviendo la confianza, el dominio de nuestras soluciones digitales y el éxito a largo plazo del especialista. Asegurarás que cada usuario inicie su relación con Doctoralia con bases sólidas y un acompañamiento cercano, contribuyendo a la transformación digital de su práctica profesional.

Responsabilidades clave


Liderar el proceso completo de onboarding para nuevos clientes, asegurando su integración satisfactoria y el dominio inicial de la plataforma.
Capacitar y guiar a los profesionales de la salud en el uso eficiente de nuestras herramientas digitales, adaptando la formación a sus necesidades específicas.
Identificar áreas de mejora a lo largo del proceso de incorporación y proponer soluciones innovadoras para optimizar la experiencia del usuario.

Colaborar estrechamente con los equipos de Producto y Soporte para canalizar feedback de los usuarios y contribuir a la mejora continua de nuestras soluciones.


🎯Perfil Profesional


Experiencia: De 1 a 2 años en Customer Success o Account Management (KAM), manejando carteras de alto volumen (100-150 clientes).
ADN Tech: Te mueves como pez en el agua en entornos Startup, Marketing o Publicidad.
Data-Driven: Sabes leer datos, analizar campañas de Google Ads y usarlos para contar una historia de éxito.
Tech Stack: Dominas CRM, Zoom, Slack y el ecosistema de Google Workspace.
Soft Skills: Tienes una mentalidad orientada a la resolución de problemas, la empatía y la resiliencia en la retención de clientes.
Inglés intermedio.


Propuesta de Valor (Compensación y Beneficios)

Ofrecemos un entorno de alto rendimiento con una estructura de beneficios competitiva:


🏠 Esquema Híbrido: El equilibrio perfecto entre la energía de la oficina y la comodidad del home office.

🌴 Descanso Real: 22 días de vacaciones desde el año 1 + tu cumpleaños libre para celebrar.
🏥 Salud Primero: Seguro de Gastos Médicos Mayores para tu tranquilidad.
💰 Futuro y Beneficios: Fondo de ahorro y vales de despensa.
💪 Bienestar: Membresía en TotalPass & iFeel para tu bienestar físico y emocional.
